```{r}
# remove "biocides" from the annotation since it's not a drug class and we don't have a clear definition of which classes it should map to
drug_class_annot_manual <- drug_class_annot_manual %>%
  filter(Drug_Class_Resfinder != "Biocides")

cat("länge nach dem Biocides gefiltert wurden:", length(unique(drug_class_annot_manual$Drug_Class_Resfinder)), "drug classes")

```

### aggregate according to new annotation

```{r}
# Map old Drug_Class to the new manual annotation and aggregate CPM by new class.
drug_class_resfinder_map <- drug_class_annot_manual %>%
  transmute(
    Drug_Class = str_trim(as.character(Drug_Class)),
    Drug_Class_Resfinder = str_trim(as.character(Drug_Class_Resfinder))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class), Drug_Class != "") %>%
  distinct(Drug_Class, .keep_all = TRUE)

cpm_resfinder_long <- cpm_drugclass_long %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(as.character(Drug_Class))) %>%
  left_join(drug_class_resfinder_map, by = "Drug_Class") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), Drug_Class_Resfinder != "") %>%
  group_by(sample, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(cpm_resfinder = sum(cpm_drugclass, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# join with metadata
cpm_resfinder_long <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  left_join(
    meta %>%
      rownames_to_column("sample"),
    by = "sample"
  )


write_csv(cpm_resfinder_long, "../results/cpm_drugclass_resfinder_per_sample.csv")

cat("Rows in cpm_resfinder_long:", nrow(cpm_resfinder_long), "\n")
cat("Unique Drug_Class_Resfinder labels:", n_distinct(cpm_resfinder_long$Drug_Class_Resfinder), "\n")
```

### ARO-term boxplots for all new drug classes + long annotation export

```{r}
# Build ARO-term level CPM per sample from full data (not DESeq subset)
gene_to_aro <- feats %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  transmute(
    Gene = as.character(Prevalence_Sequence_ID),
    ARO_Term = if_else(is.na(ARO_Term) | ARO_Term == "", Gene, as.character(ARO_Term)),
    Drug_Class = as.character(Drug_Class)
  )

cpm_aro_long_all <- as.data.frame(cpm) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(-Gene, names_to = "sample", values_to = "cpm") %>%
  left_join(gene_to_aro %>% select(Gene, ARO_Term), by = "Gene") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ARO_Term), ARO_Term != "") %>%
  group_by(sample, ARO_Term) %>%
  summarise(cpm_aro = sum(cpm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category), by = "sample")

# Map ARO terms to new manual drug classes
aro_to_resfinder_long <- gene_to_aro %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  separate_rows(Drug_Class, sep = ";\\s*") %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class), Drug_Class != "") %>%
  left_join(drug_class_resfinder_map, by = "Drug_Class") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), Drug_Class_Resfinder != "") %>%
  distinct(ARO_Term, Drug_Class_Resfinder)

# Count how many new classes each ARO term maps to and derive weight 1/n
aro_class_counts <- aro_to_resfinder_long %>%
  dplyr::count(ARO_Term, name = "n_resfinder_classes") %>%
  mutate(
    weight_1_over_n = 1 / n_resfinder_classes,
    multi_annotation_flag = n_resfinder_classes > 1
  )

# Long annotation table with overall and per-category medians.
aro_mean_cpm_tbl <- cpm_aro_long_all %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
  summarise(mean_cpm_aro = mean(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_cpm_aro = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
                                    .groups = "drop")

aro_median_cpm_by_category_long <- cpm_aro_long_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), category != "") %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term, category) %>%
  summarise(
    median_cpm_aro_category = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

aro_median_cpm_by_category_wide <- aro_median_cpm_by_category_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = category,
    values_from = median_cpm_aro_category,
    names_prefix = "median_cpm_"
  )

aro_resfinder_annotation_long <- aro_to_resfinder_long %>%
  left_join(aro_mean_cpm_tbl, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  left_join(aro_median_cpm_by_category_wide, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  left_join(aro_class_counts, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  arrange(Drug_Class_Resfinder, desc(mean_cpm_aro), ARO_Term)

# Weighted mean CPM contribution for a class if an ARO term has multiple classes
aro_resfinder_annotation_long <- aro_resfinder_annotation_long %>%
  mutate(weighted_mean_cpm_contribution = mean_cpm_aro * weight_1_over_n)

write_csv(
  aro_resfinder_annotation_long,
  "../results/aro_term_resfinder_annotation_long.csv"
)

write_csv(
  aro_median_cpm_by_category_long,
  "../results/aro_term_median_cpm_by_category_long.csv"
)

if (requireNamespace("writexl", quietly = TRUE)) {
  writexl::write_xlsx(
    list(
      aro_term_resfinder_annotation_long = aro_resfinder_annotation_long,
      aro_term_median_cpm_by_category = aro_median_cpm_by_category_long,
      aro_term_class_counts = aro_class_counts
    ),
    "../results/aro_term_resfinder_annotation_long.xlsx"
  )
} else {
  message("Package 'writexl' not installed; CSV export was written instead of XLSX.")
}

# Create one PDF per Drug_Class_Resfinder with ARO-term boxplots (multi-page if needed)
out_dir <- "../figures/aro_term_boxplots_by_resfinder"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

terms_per_page <- 12
class_levels <- sort(unique(aro_to_resfinder_long$Drug_Class_Resfinder))
pdf_index <- vector("list", length(class_levels))

for (i in seq_along(class_levels)) {
  class_i <- class_levels[i]

  class_terms <- aro_to_resfinder_long %>%
    filter(Drug_Class_Resfinder == class_i) %>%
    pull(ARO_Term) %>%
    unique()

  class_plot_df <- cpm_aro_long_all %>%
    filter(ARO_Term %in% class_terms, !is.na(category))

  # Order terms by median abundance inside class
  term_order <- class_plot_df %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
    summarise(median_cpm = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(median_cpm)) %>%
    pull(ARO_Term)

  class_plot_df <- class_plot_df %>%
    mutate(ARO_Term = factor(ARO_Term, levels = term_order))

  n_pages <- ceiling(length(term_order) / terms_per_page)
  safe_name <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", tolower(class_i))
  pdf_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("aro_terms_", safe_name, ".pdf"))

  grDevices::cairo_pdf(pdf_file, width = 12, height = 8, onefile = TRUE)
  for (page_i in seq_len(n_pages)) {
    idx_start <- (page_i - 1) * terms_per_page + 1
    idx_end <- min(page_i * terms_per_page, length(term_order))
    terms_page <- term_order[idx_start:idx_end]

    p_page <- class_plot_df %>%
      filter(ARO_Term %in% terms_page) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = category, y = log10(cpm_aro + 1e-6), fill = category)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.25, alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = NA) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 0.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ ARO_Term, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = sample_type_colors) +
      my_theme() +
      labs(
        title = paste0(class_i, " | ARO-term boxplots (page ", page_i, " / ", n_pages, ")"),
        x = "Sample category",
        y = "log10(CPM + 1e-6)"
      ) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8)
      )

    print(p_page)
  }
  grDevices::dev.off()

  pdf_index[[i]] <- tibble(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder = class_i,
    n_aro_terms = length(term_order),
    n_pages = n_pages,
    pdf_file = pdf_file
  )
}

pdf_index_tbl <- bind_rows(pdf_index)
write_csv(pdf_index_tbl, "../results/aro_term_boxplot_pdf_index.csv")

cat("Generated", nrow(pdf_index_tbl), "class-level PDF files in", out_dir, "\n")
cat("Annotation long table rows:", nrow(aro_resfinder_annotation_long), "\n")
```

### ARO-term category dotplots for each new drug class

```{r}
# Same idea as peptide-antibiotic dotplot, generated automatically for each new class.
dot_out_dir <- "../figures/aro_term_category_dotplots_by_resfinder"
if (!dir.exists(dot_out_dir)) dir.create(dot_out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

aro_class_cat_summary <- cpm_aro_long_all %>%
  inner_join(aro_to_resfinder_long, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), !is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder)) %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder, ARO_Term, category) %>%
  summarise(
    median_log10_cpm = median(log10(cpm_aro + 1e-6), na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence_pct = mean(cpm_aro > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    mean_cpm = mean(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cpm = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_index_list <- vector("list", length(class_levels))
plot_obj_list <- vector("list", length(class_levels))
export_font_family <- "sans"

for (i in seq_along(class_levels)) {
  class_i <- class_levels[i]

  class_tbl <- aro_class_cat_summary %>%
    filter(Drug_Class_Resfinder == class_i)

  if (nrow(class_tbl) == 0) {
    next
  }

  aro_dot_order <- class_tbl %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
    summarise(overall_median_log10 = median(median_log10_cpm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(overall_median_log10)) %>%
    pull(ARO_Term)

  class_tbl <- class_tbl %>%
    mutate(ARO_Term = factor(ARO_Term, levels = aro_dot_order))

  n_terms <- nlevels(class_tbl$ARO_Term)
  axis_y_size <- dplyr::case_when(
    n_terms <= 60 ~ 7,
    n_terms <= 100 ~ 6,
    n_terms <= 150 ~ 5,
    TRUE ~ 4
  )

  p_class_dot <- ggplot(
    class_tbl,
    aes(x = category, y = ARO_Term, size = prevalence_pct, color = median_log10_cpm)
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.2, 8), limits = c(0, 100), name = "Prevalence (%)") +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", name = "Median log10(CPM + 1e-6)") +
    my_theme() +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Category summary of ARO terms: ", class_i),
      subtitle = "Color: median abundance, Size: prevalence across samples",
      x = "Sample Category",
      y = "ARO Term"
    ) +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = export_font_family),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = axis_y_size),
      legend.position = "right"
    )

  safe_name <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", tolower(class_i))
  out_svg <- file.path(dot_out_dir, paste0("aro_category_summary_", safe_name, ".svg"))
  out_height_raw <- max(5, 0.26 * n_terms + 3)
  out_height <- min(45, out_height_raw)
  height_was_capped <- out_height_raw > out_height

  ggsave(out_svg, p_class_dot, device = "svg", width = 12, height = out_height, dpi = 300)
  plot_obj_list[[i]] <- p_class_dot

  plot_index_list[[i]] <- tibble(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder = class_i,
    n_aro_terms = n_distinct(class_tbl$ARO_Term),
    plot_height_in = out_height,
    height_was_capped = height_was_capped,
    svg_file = out_svg
  )
}

plot_index_tbl <- bind_rows(plot_index_list)
write_csv(plot_index_tbl, "../results/aro_term_category_dotplots_resfinder_index.csv")

# Single multi-page PDF with all class plots (one page per class)
combined_pdf_file <- "../figures/aro_term_category_dotplots_all_resfinder_classes.pdf"
grDevices::cairo_pdf(combined_pdf_file, width = 12, height = 16, onefile = TRUE)
for (p in plot_obj_list) {
  if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
}
grDevices::dev.off()

cat("Generated", nrow(plot_index_tbl), "per-class ARO-term dotplots in", dot_out_dir, "\n")
cat("Combined multi-page PDF:", combined_pdf_file, "\n")
```

### Weighted category summary on new drug classes

```{r}
# Join sample-level ARO CPM to class mapping and apply 1/n weighting for multi-annotated ARO terms.
drugclass_weighted_long <- cpm_aro_long_all %>%
  left_join(
    aro_resfinder_annotation_long %>%
      select(ARO_Term, Drug_Class_Resfinder, n_resfinder_classes, weight_1_over_n, multi_annotation_flag) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = "ARO_Term"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), Drug_Class_Resfinder != "") %>%
  mutate(cpm_weighted = cpm_aro * weight_1_over_n)

# Optional: exclude glycopeptides from this overview (case-insensitive match).
drugclass_weighted_long_no_gly <- drugclass_weighted_long %>%
  filter(!str_detect(str_to_lower(Drug_Class_Resfinder), "glycopeptide"))

# Per sample x class weighted CPM.
drugclass_weighted_sample <- drugclass_weighted_long_no_gly %>%
  group_by(sample, category, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(cpm_class_weighted = sum(cpm_weighted, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Category summary for dotplot.
drugclass_category_summary <- drugclass_weighted_sample %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder, category) %>%
  summarise(
    median_log10_cpm = median(log10(cpm_class_weighted + 1e-6), na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence_pct = mean(cpm_class_weighted > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    mean_cpm = mean(cpm_class_weighted, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cpm = median(cpm_class_weighted, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

class_dot_order <- drugclass_category_summary %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(overall_median_log10 = median(median_log10_cpm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(overall_median_log10)) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

drugclass_category_summary <- drugclass_category_summary %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = class_dot_order))

p_drugclass_category_dot <- ggplot(
  drugclass_category_summary,
  aes(x = category, y = Drug_Class_Resfinder, size = prevalence_pct, color = median_log10_cpm)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.2, 8), limits = c(0, 100), name = "Prevalence (%)") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", name = "Median log10(CPM + 1e-6)") +
  my_theme() +
  labs(
    title = "Weighted category summary of new Drug_Class_Resfinder",
    subtitle = "Color: median abundance, Size: prevalence, CPM weighted by 1/n for multi-annotated ARO terms",
    x = "Sample Category",
    y = "Drug Class (new annotation)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(p_drugclass_category_dot)



ggsave(
  "../figures/drugclass_resfinder_category_summary_dotplot_weighted.svg",
  p_drugclass_category_dot,
  width = 11,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 300,
  web_fonts ="DejaVu Sans"
)

write_csv(
  drugclass_category_summary,
  "../results/drugclass_resfinder_category_summary_weighted.csv"
)

# Accounting check: compare unweighted and weighted totals per sample.
accounting_check <- drugclass_weighted_long_no_gly %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    total_unweighted = sum(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_weighted = sum(cpm_weighted, na.rm = TRUE),
    ratio_weighted_to_unweighted = if_else(total_unweighted > 0, total_weighted / total_unweighted, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(1 - ratio_weighted_to_unweighted)))

write_csv(accounting_check, "../results/drugclass_resfinder_weighting_accounting_check.csv")

cat("Classes in weighted dotplot summary:", n_distinct(drugclass_category_summary$Drug_Class_Resfinder), "\n")
cat("Mean weighted/unweighted ratio across samples:", round(mean(accounting_check$ratio_weighted_to_unweighted, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
```

### Quick prevalence check (new drug classes)

```{r}
# Quick prevalence of each new class across sample categories.
# Prevalence is defined as % of samples in a category with CPM > 0.
quick_prev_tbl <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category)) %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder, category) %>%
  summarise(
    prevalence_pct = mean(cpm_resfinder > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    n_positive = sum(cpm_resfinder > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

quick_prev_order <- quick_prev_tbl %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(mean_prevalence = mean(prevalence_pct, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_prevalence)) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

quick_prev_tbl <- quick_prev_tbl %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = quick_prev_order))

p_quick_prev <- ggplot(
  quick_prev_tbl,
  aes(x = category, y = Drug_Class_Resfinder, fill = prevalence_pct)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", limits = c(0, 100), name = "Prevalence (%)") +
  my_theme() +
  labs(
    title = "Quick prevalence check of new drug classes",
    subtitle = "Percent of samples with CPM > 0",
    x = "Sample Category",
    y = "Drug Class (new annotation)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))

print(p_quick_prev)

write_csv(quick_prev_tbl, "../results/quick_prevalence_new_drug_classes_by_category.csv")


ggsave(
  "../figures/quick_prevalence_new_drug_classes_by_category.svg",
  p_quick_prev,
  width = 10,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Quick prevalence rows:", nrow(quick_prev_tbl), "\n")
```

### Quick prevalence check from raw counts only

```{r}
# Raw-count prevalence: class is present in a sample if summed raw counts > 0.
# This does not use CPM values.
counts_long_all <- counts_df %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Prevalence_Sequence_ID,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "raw_count"
  )

gene_to_old_drugclass <- feats %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  transmute(
    Prevalence_Sequence_ID = as.character(Prevalence_Sequence_ID),
    Drug_Class = as.character(Drug_Class)
  ) %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  separate_rows(Drug_Class, sep = ";\\s*") %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class), Drug_Class != "")

counts_resfinder_long <- counts_long_all %>%
  left_join(gene_to_old_drugclass, by = "Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  left_join(drug_class_resfinder_map, by = "Drug_Class") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), Drug_Class_Resfinder != "") %>%
  group_by(sample, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(raw_count_resfinder = sum(raw_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Zero-fill missing sample x class combinations for correct prevalence denominators.
all_rf_classes <- sort(unique(counts_resfinder_long$Drug_Class_Resfinder))
all_samples_meta <- rownames(meta)

counts_resfinder_long <- expand_grid(
  sample = all_samples_meta,
  Drug_Class_Resfinder = all_rf_classes
) %>%
  left_join(counts_resfinder_long, by = c("sample", "Drug_Class_Resfinder")) %>%
  mutate(raw_count_resfinder = replace_na(raw_count_resfinder, 0)) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category), by = "sample")

quick_prev_raw_tbl <- counts_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category)) %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder, category) %>%
  summarise(
    prevalence_pct = mean(raw_count_resfinder > 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    n_positive = sum(raw_count_resfinder > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_samples = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

quick_prev_raw_order <- quick_prev_raw_tbl %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(mean_prevalence = mean(prevalence_pct, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_prevalence)) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

quick_prev_raw_tbl <- quick_prev_raw_tbl %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = quick_prev_raw_order))

p_quick_prev_raw <- ggplot(
  quick_prev_raw_tbl,
  aes(x = category, y = Drug_Class_Resfinder, fill = prevalence_pct)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", limits = c(0, 100), name = "Prevalence (%)") +
  my_theme() +
  labs(
    title = "Quick prevalence check of new drug classes (raw counts)",
    subtitle = "Percent of samples with summed raw counts > 0",
    x = "Sample Category",
    y = "Drug Class (new annotation)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))

print(p_quick_prev_raw)

write_csv(quick_prev_raw_tbl, "../results/quick_prevalence_new_drug_classes_by_category_rawcounts.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/quick_prevalence_new_drug_classes_by_category_rawcounts.svg",
  p_quick_prev_raw,
  width = 10,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Quick raw-count prevalence rows:", nrow(quick_prev_raw_tbl), "\n")
```

### heatmaps drug class x sample with new annotation

```{r}

library(viridis)
# 1) Build full Drug_Class_Resfinder x sample matrix
all_drug_classes <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  distinct(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

all_samples <- rownames(meta)

heatmap_tbl <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  Drug_Class_Resfinder = all_drug_classes,
  sample = all_samples
) %>%
  left_join(
    cpm_resfinder_long %>%
      select(sample, Drug_Class_Resfinder, cpm_resfinder),
    by = c("Drug_Class_Resfinder", "sample")
  ) %>%
  mutate(cpm_resfinder = replace_na(cpm_resfinder, 0))

heatmap_mat <- heatmap_tbl %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = cpm_resfinder) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- heatmap_mat$Drug_Class_Resfinder
heatmap_mat$Drug_Class_Resfinder <- NULL
heatmap_mat <- as.matrix(heatmap_mat)

heatmap_log10 <- log10(heatmap_mat + 1e-6)


control_level <- "Non_farmer_controls"

# Original heatmap: all pigs pooled together
drugclass_mw_annotations_all_pigs <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(category %in% c("Pigs", farmer_level, control_level)) %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    p_pigs_vs_ctrl = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(cpm_resfinder[category == "Pigs"],
                  cpm_resfinder[category == control_level])$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    median_pigs = median(cpm_resfinder[category == "Pigs"], na.rm = TRUE),
    median_ctrl_for_pigs = median(cpm_resfinder[category == control_level], na.rm = TRUE),
    p_farmer_vs_ctrl = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(cpm_resfinder[category == farmer_level],
                  cpm_resfinder[category == control_level])$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    median_farmer = median(cpm_resfinder[category == farmer_level], na.rm = TRUE),
    median_ctrl_for_farmer = median(cpm_resfinder[category == control_level], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj_pigs_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_pigs_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
    p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_farmer_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
    pigs_vs_ctrl_mw = case_when(
      is.na(p_adj_pigs_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
      p_adj_pigs_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_pigs > median_ctrl_for_pigs ~ "sig_higher_in_all_pigs",
      p_adj_pigs_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_pigs < median_ctrl_for_pigs ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = case_when(
      is.na(p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
      p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_farmer > median_ctrl_for_farmer ~ "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers",
      p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_farmer < median_ctrl_for_farmer ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )
# Build annotation columns/colors locally so this section does not depend
# on objects from earlier heatmap code chunks.
sample_annot_var_local <- if ("sample_type" %in% colnames(meta)) "sample_type" else "category"
stage_var_local <- if ("category2" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  "category2"
} else if ("growth_stage" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  "growth_stage"
} else if ("grwoth_stage" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  "grwoth_stage"
} else {
  NA_character_
}

build_ann_col <- function(sample_ids) {
  ann <- data.frame(
    sample_type = as.character(meta[sample_ids, sample_annot_var_local]),
    category = as.character(meta[sample_ids, "category"]),
    row.names = sample_ids
  )

  if (!is.na(stage_var_local)) {
    pig_idx <- ann$category == "Pigs"
    stage_vals <- as.character(meta[sample_ids, stage_var_local])
    use_stage_idx <- pig_idx & !is.na(stage_vals) & stage_vals != ""
    ann$category[use_stage_idx] <- stage_vals[use_stage_idx]
  }

  ann
}

build_color_map <- function(levels_vec, preferred_map = NULL, palette_name = "Dark 2") {
  levels_vec <- unique(levels_vec)
  levels_vec <- levels_vec[!is.na(levels_vec) & levels_vec != ""]
  if (length(levels_vec) == 0) return(setNames(character(0), character(0)))

  out <- setNames(rep(NA_character_, length(levels_vec)), levels_vec)

  if (!is.null(preferred_map)) {
    preferred_map <- preferred_map[!is.na(names(preferred_map)) & names(preferred_map) != ""]
    overlap <- intersect(levels_vec, names(preferred_map))
    out[overlap] <- preferred_map[overlap]
  }

  missing_lvls <- names(out)[is.na(out)]
  if (length(missing_lvls) > 0) {
    fallback <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(missing_lvls), palette = palette_name)
    out[missing_lvls] <- fallback
  }

  out
}

normalize_stage_block <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c("Suckling", "Suckling_piglets") ~ "Suckling_piglets",
    x %in% c("Weaning", "Fattening", "Older_pigs") ~ "Older_pigs",
    TRUE ~ x
  )
}

order_samples_by_blocks <- function(mat, ann_col) {
  block_order <- c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Older_pigs", "Suckling_piglets")
  ids <- colnames(mat)
  block_vals <- normalize_stage_block(ann_col[ids, "category"])

  out <- character(0)
  for (b in block_order) {
    block_ids <- ids[block_vals == b]
    if (length(block_ids) == 0) next
    if (length(block_ids) <= 2) {
      out <- c(out, block_ids)
    } else {
      hc <- hclust(dist(t(mat[, block_ids, drop = FALSE]), method = "euclidean"), method = "complete")
      out <- c(out, block_ids[hc$order])
    }
  }

  # append any labels not covered by block_order
  out <- c(out, setdiff(ids, out))
  out
}

make_col_order_callback <- function(desired_order) {
  desired_rank <- setNames(seq_along(desired_order), desired_order)
  function(hc, mat) {
    ord_w <- desired_rank[colnames(mat)]
    ord_w[is.na(ord_w)] <- max(ord_w, na.rm = TRUE) + seq_len(sum(is.na(ord_w)))
    dend <- stats::reorder(as.dendrogram(hc), wts = ord_w, agglo.FUN = mean)
    as.hclust(dend)
  }
}

ann_col_base <- build_ann_col(colnames(heatmap_log10))

sample_preferred <- NULL
if (exists("sample_type_colors") && !is.null(sample_type_colors)) {
  sample_preferred <- sample_type_colors
}

category_preferred <- NULL
if (exists("category2_colors") && !is.null(category2_colors)) {
  category_preferred <- c(category_preferred, category2_colors)
}
if (exists("pig_stage_colors") && !is.null(pig_stage_colors)) {
  category_preferred <- c(category_preferred, pig_stage_colors)
}

sample_ann_colors_local <- build_color_map(ann_col_base$sample_type, sample_preferred, "Set 2")
category_ann_colors_local <- build_color_map(ann_col_base$category, category_preferred, "Dark 2")



# Build annotations for all-pigs heatmap
ann_col_all_pigs <- build_ann_col(colnames(heatmap_log10))

row_annot_all_pigs <- tibble(Drug_Class_Resfinder = rownames(heatmap_log10)) %>%
  left_join(
    drugclass_mw_annotations_all_pigs %>%
      select(Drug_Class_Resfinder, pigs_vs_ctrl_mw, farmer_vs_ctrl_mw),
    by = "Drug_Class_Resfinder"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pigs_vs_ctrl_mw = replace_na(pigs_vs_ctrl_mw, "not_tested"),
    farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = replace_na(farmer_vs_ctrl_mw, "not_tested")
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(row_annot_all_pigs) <- row_annot_all_pigs$Drug_Class_Resfinder
row_annot_all_pigs$Drug_Class_Resfinder <- NULL

row_annot_all_pigs$pigs_vs_ctrl_mw <- factor(
  row_annot_all_pigs$pigs_vs_ctrl_mw,
  levels = c("sig_higher_in_all_pigs", "sig_higher_in_controls", "ns", "not_tested")
)

row_annot_all_pigs$farmer_vs_ctrl_mw <- factor(
  row_annot_all_pigs$farmer_vs_ctrl_mw,
  levels = c("sig_higher_in_pig_farmers", "sig_higher_in_controls", "ns", "not_tested")
)

pigs_sig_colors_all <- c(
  "sig_higher_in_all_pigs" = "#B2182B",
  "sig_higher_in_controls" = "#2166AC",
  "ns" = "#BDBDBD",
  "not_tested" = "#F0F0F0"
)

farmer_sig_colors_all <- c(
  "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers" = "#D6604D",
  "sig_higher_in_controls" = "#2166AC",
  "ns" = "#BDBDBD",
  "not_tested" = "#F0F0F0"
)

# Reorder columns by fixed group blocks with within-block clustering
ord_all <- order_samples_by_blocks(heatmap_log10, ann_col_all_pigs)
heatmap_log10_ordered <- heatmap_log10[, ord_all, drop = FALSE]
ann_col_all_pigs <- ann_col_all_pigs[colnames(heatmap_log10_ordered), , drop = FALSE]
cb_all <- make_col_order_callback(colnames(heatmap_log10_ordered))


library(viridis)
rng <- range(heatmap_log10_ordered, na.rm = TRUE)

breaks_low  <- seq(rng[1], 0, length.out = 10)   # coarse for -6..0
breaks_high <- seq(0, rng[2], length.out = 150)  # dense for 0..4
my_breaks   <- unique(c(breaks_low, breaks_high))

my_cols <- viridis(length(my_breaks) - 1, option = "C")

hm_width <- 15
hm_height <- max(8, nrow(heatmap_log10) * 0.25 + 3)

# 1) PDF export
pheatmap(
  heatmap_log10_ordered,
  color = my_cols,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  clustering_callback = cb_all,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = ann_col_all_pigs,
  annotation_row = row_annot_all_pigs,
  annotation_colors = list(
    sample_type = sample_ann_colors_local,
    category = category_ann_colors_local,
    pigs_vs_ctrl_mw = pigs_sig_colors_all,
    farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = farmer_sig_colors_all
  ),
  main = "Drug Class x Samples (All pigs pooled vs controls)",
  fontsize_row = 10,
  filename = "../figures/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_all_pigs_stats.pdf",
  width = hm_width,
  height = hm_height
)

# 2) SVG export (DejaVu Sans)
if (requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
  svglite::svglite(
    "../figures/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_all_pigs_stats.svg",
    width = hm_width,
    height = hm_height,
    system_fonts = list(
      sans = "DejaVu Sans",
      serif = "DejaVu Sans",
      mono = "DejaVu Sans"
    )
  )
} else {
  grDevices::svg(
    "../figures/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_all_pigs_stats.svg",
    width = hm_width,
    height = hm_height,
    family = "DejaVu Sans"
  )
}

hm_svg <- pheatmap(
  heatmap_log10_ordered,
  color = my_cols,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  clustering_callback = cb_all,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  annotation_col = ann_col_all_pigs,
  annotation_row = row_annot_all_pigs,
  annotation_colors = list(
    sample_type = sample_ann_colors_local,
    category = category_ann_colors_local,
    pigs_vs_ctrl_mw = pigs_sig_colors_all,
    farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = farmer_sig_colors_all
  ),
  main = "Drug Class x Samples (All pigs pooled vs controls)",
  fontsize_row = 8,
  silent = TRUE
)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(hm_svg$gtable)
grDevices::dev.off()

write_csv(
  drugclass_mw_annotations_all_pigs,
  "../results/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_mw_all_pigs_stats.csv"
)

# Helper to compute MW stats for a specific pig group using category2
compute_mw_by_pig_group <- function(df_long, pig_group_name) {
  pig_group_var <- if ("category2" %in% colnames(df_long)) {
    "category2"
  } else if ("growth_stage" %in% colnames(df_long)) {
    "growth_stage"
  } else if ("grwoth_stage" %in% colnames(df_long)) {
    "grwoth_stage"
  } else {
    stop("No pig stage column found. Expected one of: category2, growth_stage, grwoth_stage")
  }

  df_long %>%
    filter(category %in% c("Pigs", farmer_level, control_level)) %>%
    group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
    summarise(
      p_pig_group_vs_ctrl = tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(cpm_resfinder[.data[[pig_group_var]] == pig_group_name],
                    cpm_resfinder[category == control_level])$p.value,
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      ),
      median_pig_group = median(cpm_resfinder[.data[[pig_group_var]] == pig_group_name], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_ctrl = median(cpm_resfinder[category == control_level], na.rm = TRUE),
      p_farmer_vs_ctrl = tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(cpm_resfinder[category == farmer_level],
                    cpm_resfinder[category == control_level])$p.value,
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      ),
      median_farmer = median(cpm_resfinder[category == farmer_level], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      p_adj_pig_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_pig_group_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
      p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_farmer_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
      pig_vs_ctrl_mw = case_when(
        is.na(p_adj_pig_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
        p_adj_pig_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_pig_group > median_ctrl ~ paste0("sig_higher_in_", pig_group_name),
        p_adj_pig_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_pig_group < median_ctrl ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      ),
      farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = case_when(
        is.na(p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
        p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_farmer > median_ctrl ~ "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers",
        p_adj_farmer_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & median_farmer < median_ctrl ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )
}

# Helper to build and plot heatmap for a pig group
plot_heatmap_by_pig_group <- function(df_long, pig_group_name, fig_suffix, title_text) {
  mw_stats <- compute_mw_by_pig_group(df_long, pig_group_name)
  
  # Build column and row annotations
  ann_col_rf <- build_ann_col(colnames(heatmap_log10))
  
  row_annot_rf <- tibble(Drug_Class_Resfinder = rownames(heatmap_log10)) %>%
    left_join(
      mw_stats %>%
        select(Drug_Class_Resfinder, pig_vs_ctrl_mw, farmer_vs_ctrl_mw),
      by = "Drug_Class_Resfinder"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      pig_vs_ctrl_mw = replace_na(pig_vs_ctrl_mw, "not_tested"),
      farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = replace_na(farmer_vs_ctrl_mw, "not_tested")
    ) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  rownames(row_annot_rf) <- row_annot_rf$Drug_Class_Resfinder
  row_annot_rf$Drug_Class_Resfinder <- NULL
  
  pig_sig_label <- paste0("sig_higher_in_", pig_group_name)
  row_annot_rf$pig_vs_ctrl_mw <- factor(
    row_annot_rf$pig_vs_ctrl_mw,
    levels = c(pig_sig_label, "sig_higher_in_controls", "ns", "not_tested")
  )
  
  row_annot_rf$farmer_vs_ctrl_mw <- factor(
    row_annot_rf$farmer_vs_ctrl_mw,
    levels = c("sig_higher_in_pig_farmers", "sig_higher_in_controls", "ns", "not_tested")
  )
  
  pig_sig_colors_rf <- c(
    setNames("#B2182B", pig_sig_label),
    "sig_higher_in_controls" = "#2166AC",
    "ns" = "#BDBDBD",
    "not_tested" = "#F0F0F0"
  )
  
  farmer_sig_colors_rf <- c(
    "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers" = "#D6604D",
    "sig_higher_in_controls" = "#2166AC",
    "ns" = "#BDBDBD",
    "not_tested" = "#F0F0F0"
  )
  
  # Reorder columns by fixed group blocks with within-block clustering
  ord_rf <- order_samples_by_blocks(heatmap_log10, ann_col_rf)
  hm_ordered <- heatmap_log10[, ord_rf, drop = FALSE]
  ann_col_rf <- ann_col_rf[colnames(hm_ordered), , drop = FALSE]
  cb_rf <- make_col_order_callback(colnames(hm_ordered))
  
  ann_colors_list <- list(
    sample_type = sample_ann_colors_local,
    category = category_ann_colors_local,
    farmer_vs_ctrl_mw = farmer_sig_colors_rf
  )
  ann_colors_list[["pig_vs_ctrl_mw"]] <- pig_sig_colors_rf
  
  # Plot
  hm_width <- 15
  hm_height <- max(8, nrow(heatmap_log10) * 0.25 + 3)

  # 1) PDF export (same style as the all-pigs heatmap)
  pheatmap(
    hm_ordered,
    color = my_cols,
    breaks = my_breaks,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    clustering_callback = cb_rf,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    annotation_col = ann_col_rf,
    annotation_row = row_annot_rf,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors_list,
    main = title_text,
    fontsize_row = 8,
    filename = paste0("../figures/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_", fig_suffix, ".pdf"),
    width = hm_width,
    height = hm_height
  )

  # 2) SVG export (same font handling as the all-pigs heatmap)
  svg_file <- paste0("../figures/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_", fig_suffix, ".svg")
  if (requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    svglite::svglite(
      svg_file,
      width = hm_width,
      height = hm_height,
      system_fonts = list(
        sans = "DejaVu Sans",
        serif = "DejaVu Sans",
        mono = "DejaVu Sans"
      )
    )
  } else {
    grDevices::svg(
      svg_file,
      width = hm_width,
      height = hm_height,
      family = "DejaVu Sans"
    )
  }

  hm_svg <- pheatmap(
    hm_ordered,
    color = my_cols,
    breaks = my_breaks,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    clustering_callback = cb_rf,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    annotation_col = ann_col_rf,
    annotation_row = row_annot_rf,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors_list,
    main = title_text,
    fontsize_row = 8,
    silent = TRUE
  )
  grid::grid.newpage()
  grid::grid.draw(hm_svg$gtable)
  grDevices::dev.off()
  
  write_csv(
    mw_stats,
    paste0("../results/heatmap_all_drugclasses_resfinder_mw_", fig_suffix, ".csv")
  )
  
  return(mw_stats)
}

# Generate heatmaps for Suckling_piglets and Older_pigs
mw_suckling <- plot_heatmap_by_pig_group(
  cpm_resfinder_long,
  pig_group_name = "Suckling_piglets",
  fig_suffix = "suckling_pigs_stats",
  title_text = "drug classes x all samples (Suckling piglets vs controls)"
)

mw_older <- plot_heatmap_by_pig_group(
  cpm_resfinder_long,
  pig_group_name = "Older_pigs",
  fig_suffix = "older_pigs_stats",
  title_text = "drug classes x all samples (Older pigs vs controls)"
)

```

### abundance barplots with Mann-Whitney-U statistics

```{r}
# Drug_Class_Resfinder abundance boxplots with pairwise Mann-Whitney tests.
plot_resfinder_boxplots_pdf <- function(df_long, group_var, pdf_file, stats_file) {
  stopifnot(group_var %in% colnames(df_long))

  resfinder_classes <- df_long %>%
    dplyr::count(Drug_Class_Resfinder, sort = TRUE) %>%
    pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

  if (length(resfinder_classes) == 0) {
    warning(paste0("No Drug_Class_Resfinder entries available for ", group_var, " boxplot PDF."))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  all_wilcox <- list()
  grDevices::cairo_pdf(pdf_file, width = 6.5, height = 7.5, onefile = TRUE)

  for (dc in resfinder_classes) {
    df_plot <- df_long %>%
      filter(Drug_Class_Resfinder == dc) %>%
      mutate(
        group_label = as.character(.data[[group_var]]),
        log10_cpm = log10(cpm_resfinder + 1e-6)
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(group_label), group_label != "", is.finite(log10_cpm))

    if (group_var == "category2") {
      requested_order <- c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Suckling_piglets", "Older_pigs")
      other_levels <- setdiff(unique(df_plot$group_label), requested_order)
      df_plot <- df_plot %>%
        mutate(group_label = factor(group_label, levels = c(requested_order, sort(other_levels))))
    } else if (group_var == "category") {
      requested_order <- c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs")
      other_levels <- setdiff(unique(df_plot$group_label), requested_order)
      df_plot <- df_plot %>%
        mutate(group_label = factor(group_label, levels = c(requested_order, sort(other_levels))))
    }

    if (nrow(df_plot) == 0 || dplyr::n_distinct(df_plot$group_label) < 2) {
      next
    }

    wilcox_tbl <- tryCatch(
      {
        df_plot %>%
          rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(log10_cpm ~ group_label, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
          rstatix::add_xy_position(x = "group_label", fun = "max", step.increase = 0.2) %>%
          mutate(
            Drug_Class_Resfinder = dc,
            grouping = group_var,
            p.adj.formatted = ifelse(p.adj < 0.001, 
                                     sprintf("%.2e", p.adj), 
                                     sprintf("%.4f", p.adj))
          )
      },
      error = function(e) {
        tibble()
      }
    )

    fill_colors <- if (group_var == "category2") {
      unlist(color_codes$category2)
    } else if (group_var == "category" && "sample_type_colors" %in% names(color_codes)) {
      unlist(color_codes$sample_type_colors)
    } else {
      sample_type_colors
    }

    missing_cols <- setdiff(as.character(unique(df_plot$group_label)), names(fill_colors))
    if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
      extra_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(missing_cols), palette = "Set 2")
      names(extra_cols) <- missing_cols
      fill_colors <- c(fill_colors, extra_cols)
    }

    p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = group_label, y = log10_cpm, fill = group_label)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.75) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.3, alpha = 0.65) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Drug class (ResFinder):", dc),
        subtitle = paste("Pairwise Mann-Whitney (BH-adjusted) | grouped by", group_var),
        x = group_var,
        y = "log10(CPM + 1e-6)"
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(),
        legend.position = "none"
      )+
      scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors, drop = FALSE)

    if (nrow(wilcox_tbl) > 0) {
      p <- p +
        stat_pvalue_manual(
          wilcox_tbl,
          label = "p.adj.formatted",
          xmin = "group1",
          xmax = "group2",
          y.position = "y.position",
          tip.length = 0.01,
          bracket.size = 0.3,
          size = 2.5
        )

      all_wilcox[[length(all_wilcox) + 1]] <- wilcox_tbl
    }

    print(p)
  }

  grDevices::dev.off()

  if (length(all_wilcox) > 0) {
    wilcox_all_tbl <- bind_rows(all_wilcox) %>%
      select(grouping, Drug_Class_Resfinder, group1, group2, n1, n2, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif)
    write_csv(wilcox_all_tbl, stats_file)
  }
}

# 1) PDF grouped by category: Pigs, Pig_farmers, Non_farmer_controls
plot_resfinder_boxplots_pdf(
  df_long = cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category",
  pdf_file = "../figures/boxplots_resfinder_abundance_by_category.pdf",
  stats_file = "../results/resfinder_mannwhitney_pairwise_by_category.csv"
)

# 2) PDF grouped by category2: separates Older_pigs and Suckling_piglets
plot_resfinder_boxplots_pdf(
  df_long = cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category2",
  pdf_file = "../figures/boxplots_resfinder_abundance_by_category2.pdf",
  stats_file = "../results/resfinder_mannwhitney_pairwise_by_category2.csv"
)

```


### Supplementary multipanel SVG pages (9 panels per page)

```{r}
# Build thesis-ready multipanel pages with fixed y-axis across panels.
plot_resfinder_multipanel_svg_pages <- function(df_long, group_var, out_prefix, panels_per_page = 9) {
  stopifnot(group_var %in% colnames(df_long))

  resfinder_classes <- df_long %>%
    dplyr::count(Drug_Class_Resfinder, sort = TRUE) %>%
    pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

  if (length(resfinder_classes) == 0) {
    warning(paste0("No Drug_Class_Resfinder entries available for ", group_var, " multipanel SVG export."))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # Match grouping order from the PDF function.
  if (group_var == "category2") {
    requested_order <- c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Suckling_piglets", "Older_pigs")
  } else if (group_var == "category") {
    requested_order <- c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs")
  } else {
    requested_order <- sort(unique(as.character(df_long[[group_var]])))
  }

  # Same fill-color logic as above.
  fill_colors <- if (group_var == "category2") {
    unlist(color_codes$category2)
  } else if (group_var == "category" && "sample_type_colors" %in% names(color_codes)) {
    unlist(color_codes$sample_type_colors)
  } else {
    sample_type_colors
  }

  all_levels <- sort(unique(as.character(df_long[[group_var]])))
  missing_cols <- setdiff(all_levels, names(fill_colors))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    extra_cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(missing_cols), palette = "Set 2")
    names(extra_cols) <- missing_cols
    fill_colors <- c(fill_colors, extra_cols)
  }

  plot_list <- list()
  wilcox_all <- list()
  y_max_vals <- c()
  y_min_vals <- c()

  for (dc in resfinder_classes) {
    df_plot <- df_long %>%
      filter(Drug_Class_Resfinder == dc) %>%
      mutate(
        group_label = as.character(.data[[group_var]]),
        log10_cpm = log10(cpm_resfinder + 1e-6)
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(group_label), group_label != "", is.finite(log10_cpm))

    if (nrow(df_plot) == 0 || dplyr::n_distinct(df_plot$group_label) < 2) {
      next
    }

    other_levels <- setdiff(unique(df_plot$group_label), requested_order)
    level_order <- c(requested_order, sort(other_levels))
    df_plot <- df_plot %>%
      mutate(group_label = factor(group_label, levels = level_order))

    wilcox_tbl <- tryCatch(
      {
        df_plot %>%
          rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(log10_cpm ~ group_label, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
          rstatix::add_xy_position(x = "group_label", fun = "max", step.increase = 0.2) %>%
          mutate(
            Drug_Class_Resfinder = dc,
            grouping = group_var,
            p.adj.formatted = ifelse(
              p.adj < 0.001,
              sprintf("%.2e", p.adj),
              sprintf("%.4f", p.adj)
            )
          )
      },
      error = function(e) {
        tibble()
      }
    )

    if (nrow(wilcox_tbl) > 0) {
      y_max_vals <- c(y_max_vals, max(wilcox_tbl$y.position, na.rm = TRUE))
      wilcox_all[[length(wilcox_all) + 1]] <- wilcox_tbl
    }
    y_max_vals <- c(y_max_vals, max(df_plot$log10_cpm, na.rm = TRUE))
    y_min_vals <- c(y_min_vals, min(df_plot$log10_cpm, na.rm = TRUE))

    p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = group_label, y = log10_cpm, fill = group_label)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.75) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.0, alpha = 0.6) +
      labs(
        title = dc,
        x = group_var,
        y = "log10(CPM + 1e-6)"
      ) +
      theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
      scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)+
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 0, hjust = 0),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors, drop = FALSE)

    if (nrow(wilcox_tbl) > 0) {
      p <- p +
        stat_pvalue_manual(
          wilcox_tbl,
          label = "p.adj.formatted",
          xmin = "group1",
          xmax = "group2",
          y.position = "y.position",
          tip.length = 0.01,
          bracket.size = 0.25,
          size = 2.2,
          family = "DejaVu Sans"
        )
    }

    plot_list[[dc]] <- p
  }

  if (length(plot_list) == 0) {
    warning(paste0("No plottable Drug_Class_Resfinder entries for ", group_var, "."))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # Fixed y-axis for all panels/pages.
  y_min <- floor(min(y_min_vals, na.rm = TRUE) * 10) / 10
  y_max <- ceiling(max(y_max_vals, na.rm = TRUE) * 10) / 10
  plot_list <- lapply(plot_list, function(p) p + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_min, y_max)))

  page_index <- split(seq_along(plot_list), ceiling(seq_along(plot_list) / panels_per_page))

  for (i in seq_along(page_index)) {
    idx <- page_index[[i]]
    page_plots <- plot_list[idx]

    page_plot <- ggpubr::ggarrange(
      plotlist = page_plots,
      ncol = 3,
      nrow = 3,
      align = "hv"
    )

    out_file <- sprintf("%s_page_%02d.svg", out_prefix, i)
    ggsave(
      filename = out_file,
      plot = page_plot,
      width = 12,
      height = 11,
      dpi = 300,
      bg = "white",
      web_font ="DejaVu Sans"
    )
  }

  if (length(wilcox_all) > 0) {
    wilcox_all_tbl <- bind_rows(wilcox_all) %>%
      select(grouping, Drug_Class_Resfinder, group1, group2, n1, n2, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif)
    stats_out <- sub("\\.svg$", "_stats.csv", out_prefix)
    write_csv(wilcox_all_tbl, stats_out)
  }

  message("Saved multipanel SVG pages for ", group_var,
          " with fixed y-axis [", y_min, ", ", y_max, "]")
}

# category pages (9 panels per page)
plot_resfinder_multipanel_svg_pages(
  df_long = cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category",
  out_prefix = "../figures/boxplots_resfinder_abundance_by_category_multipanel",
  panels_per_page = 9
)

# category2 pages (9 panels per page)
plot_resfinder_multipanel_svg_pages(
  df_long = cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category2",
  out_prefix = "../figures/boxplots_resfinder_abundance_by_category2_multipanel",
  panels_per_page = 9
)
```

### Scatterplot: Suckling vs Older significance (Mann-Whitney-U)

```{r}
# Compare stage-specific significance across drug classes.
mw_safe <- function(x, y) {
  if (sum(!is.na(x)) < 2 || sum(!is.na(y)) < 2) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  tryCatch(wilcox.test(x, y)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
}

log2_median_ratio <- function(x, y, pseudo = 1e-6) {
  mx <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  my <- median(y, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(mx) || !is.finite(my)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  log2((mx + pseudo) / (my + pseudo))
}

resfinder_stage_tbl <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  mutate(
    stage_group = case_when(
      category2 == "Suckling_piglets" ~ "Suckling_piglets",
      category2 == "Older_pigs" ~ "Older_pigs",
      category == farmer_level ~ "Pig_farmers",
      category == "Non_farmer_controls" ~ "Non_farmer_controls",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(stage_group))

stage_mw_stats <- resfinder_stage_tbl %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    p_suckling_vs_ctrl = mw_safe(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Suckling_piglets"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Non_farmer_controls"]
    ),
    p_older_vs_ctrl = mw_safe(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Older_pigs"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Non_farmer_controls"]
    ),
    p_suckling_vs_farmers = mw_safe(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Suckling_piglets"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Pig_farmers"]
    ),
    p_older_vs_farmers = mw_safe(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Older_pigs"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Pig_farmers"]
    ),
    l2mr_suckling_vs_ctrl = log2_median_ratio(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Suckling_piglets"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Non_farmer_controls"]
    ),
    l2mr_older_vs_ctrl = log2_median_ratio(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Older_pigs"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Non_farmer_controls"]
    ),
    l2mr_suckling_vs_farmers = log2_median_ratio(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Suckling_piglets"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Pig_farmers"]
    ),
    l2mr_older_vs_farmers = log2_median_ratio(
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Older_pigs"],
      cpm_resfinder[stage_group == "Pig_farmers"]
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj_suckling_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_suckling_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
    p_adj_older_vs_ctrl = p.adjust(p_older_vs_ctrl, method = "BH"),
    p_adj_suckling_vs_farmers = p.adjust(p_suckling_vs_farmers, method = "BH"),
    p_adj_older_vs_farmers = p.adjust(p_older_vs_farmers, method = "BH")
  )

scatter_stage_sig <- bind_rows(
  stage_mw_stats %>%
    transmute(
      Drug_Class_Resfinder,
      reference_group = "vs Non-farmer controls",
      p_adj_suckling = p_adj_suckling_vs_ctrl,
      p_adj_older = p_adj_older_vs_ctrl,
      l2mr_suckling = l2mr_suckling_vs_ctrl,
      l2mr_older = l2mr_older_vs_ctrl
    ),
  stage_mw_stats %>%
    transmute(
      Drug_Class_Resfinder,
      reference_group = "vs Pig farmers",
      p_adj_suckling = p_adj_suckling_vs_farmers,
      p_adj_older = p_adj_older_vs_farmers,
      l2mr_suckling = l2mr_suckling_vs_farmers,
      l2mr_older = l2mr_older_vs_farmers
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    x_sig = -log10(p_adj_suckling + 1e-300),
    y_sig = -log10(p_adj_older + 1e-300),
    max_sig = pmax(x_sig, y_sig, na.rm = TRUE),
    sig_pattern = case_when(
      p_adj_suckling < 0.05 & p_adj_older < 0.05 ~ "both_sig",
      p_adj_suckling < 0.05 & (is.na(p_adj_older) | p_adj_older >= 0.05) ~ "suckling_only",
      p_adj_older < 0.05 & (is.na(p_adj_suckling) | p_adj_suckling >= 0.05) ~ "older_only",
      TRUE ~ "none_sig"
    ),
    effect_agreement = case_when(
      is.na(l2mr_suckling) | is.na(l2mr_older) ~ "missing_effect",
      sign(l2mr_suckling) == sign(l2mr_older) ~ "same_direction",
      TRUE ~ "opposite_direction"
    )
  )

label_df <- scatter_stage_sig %>%
  group_by(reference_group) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = max_sig, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

sig_cut <- -log10(0.05)

p_stage_sig <- ggplot(
  scatter_stage_sig,
  aes(x = x_sig, y = y_sig, color = sig_pattern, shape = effect_agreement)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = sig_cut, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = sig_cut, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85, size = 2.2) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = Drug_Class_Resfinder),
    size = 2.8,
    max.overlaps = 40,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ reference_group, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "both_sig" = "#B2182B",
      "suckling_only" = "#EF8A62",
      "older_only" = "#67A9CF",
      "none_sig" = "#BDBDBD"
    ),
    name = "BH-significance pattern"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "same_direction" = 16,
      "opposite_direction" = 17,
      "missing_effect" = 4
    ),
    name = "Effect direction"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Suckling vs Older: significance concordance by drug class",
    subtitle = "x = -log10(BH p) Suckling comparison, y = -log10(BH p) Older comparison",
    x = "-log10(BH p): Suckling",
    y = "-log10(BH p): Older"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

print(p_stage_sig)

write_csv(stage_mw_stats, "../results/resfinder_stage_pairwise_mw_stats.csv")
write_csv(scatter_stage_sig, "../results/resfinder_stage_sig_scatter_input.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/resfinder_stage_sig_scatterplot.svg",
  p_stage_sig,
  width = 12,
  height = 6.8,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

### Interpretation

-   Data basis: sample-level abundance table `cpm_resfinder_long` (manual Drug_Class_Resfinder annotation), excluding missing category/class/value entries where needed.
-   Global category differences: Kruskal-Wallis test per drug class, followed by Benjamini-Hochberg multiple-testing correction.
-   Pairwise group interpretation: Wilcoxon rank-sum tests between predefined groups (for example Pigs vs Pig_farmers, stage-specific contrasts), with BH-adjusted p-values.
-   Effect size direction: log2 median ratio between groups to classify classes as higher in group A, higher in group B, or similar.
-   Similarity rule (Pigs vs Pig_farmers): class labeled as same when BH p \>= 0.05 and absolute log2 median ratio \<= 0.5.
-   Reporting outputs: ranked result tables exported to results and visual summaries (barplots/scatter with thresholds and labels) exported to figures.

#### Top 3 most abundant manually annotated drug classes per category

```{r}
# Use the final manual annotation object (Drug_Class_Resfinder).
# We test each class across all categories with Kruskal-Wallis,
# BH-correct p-values, and report top 3 classes per category by median CPM.

resfinder_kw <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), !is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), !is.na(cpm_resfinder)) %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_categories = n_distinct(category),
    kw_p = if (n_categories >= 2) {
      tryCatch(
        stats::kruskal.test(cpm_resfinder ~ category)$p.value,
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      )
    } else {
      NA_real_
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(kw_p_adj = p.adjust(kw_p, method = "BH"))

top3_resfinder_by_category <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), !is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), !is.na(cpm_resfinder)) %>%
  group_by(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    median_cpm = median(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_cpm = mean(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(resfinder_kw %>% select(Drug_Class_Resfinder, kw_p, kw_p_adj), by = "Drug_Class_Resfinder") %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_cpm), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 3) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(category, desc(median_cpm))

top3_resfinder_by_category_print <- top3_resfinder_by_category %>%
  mutate(
    median_cpm = round(median_cpm, 2),
    mean_cpm = round(mean_cpm, 2),
    kw_p = signif(kw_p, 3),
    kw_p_adj = signif(kw_p_adj, 3)
  )

print(top3_resfinder_by_category_print, n = Inf)

write_csv(
  top3_resfinder_by_category,
  "../results/top3_resfinder_drugclasses_by_category.csv"
)

# Plot: median CPM bars with IQR error bars and optional sample-level jitter
top3_resfinder_samples <- top3_resfinder_by_category %>%
  select(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  inner_join(
    cpm_resfinder_long %>%
      select(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder, sample, cpm_resfinder),
    by = c("category", "Drug_Class_Resfinder")
  )

top3_resfinder_iqr <- top3_resfinder_samples %>%
  group_by(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    median_cpm = median(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1_cpm = quantile(cpm_resfinder, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3_cpm = quantile(cpm_resfinder, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


plot_top3_resfinder <- ggplot(
  top3_resfinder_iqr,
  aes(
    x = forcats::fct_reorder(Drug_Class_Resfinder, median_cpm, .desc = TRUE),
    y = median_cpm
  )
) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey55", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = q1_cpm, ymax = q3_cpm), width = 0.22, linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_jitter(
    data = top3_resfinder_samples,
    aes(
      x = forcats::fct_reorder(Drug_Class_Resfinder, cpm_resfinder, .fun = median, .desc = TRUE),
      y = cpm_resfinder
    ),
    width = 0.13,
    height = 0,
    size = 1.5,
    alpha = 0.45,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
  ~ category,
  scales = "free_x",
  labeller = labeller(category = as_labeller(
    function(x) ifelse(x %in% names(color_codes$label_mapping),
                       color_codes$label_mapping[x],
                       x)
  ))
) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 3 drug classes by category",
    subtitle = "Bars = median CPM, error bars = IQR (Q1-Q3), points = samples",
    x = "Drug class",
    y = "CPM"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
  theme_publication()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
  

print(plot_top3_resfinder)


ggsave(
  "../figures/top3_resfinder_drugclasses_by_category.svg",
  plot_top3_resfinder,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

#### Pigs have more of compared to human/farmer

```{r}
# Practical interpretation workflow:
# 1) one compact stats table per contrast
# 2) one ranking plot (top effects among BH-significant classes)

compare_resfinder_groups <- function(df, group_var, group_a, group_b, out_stub) {
  stopifnot(group_var %in% colnames(df))

  tbl <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[group_var]]), .data[[group_var]] %in% c(group_a, group_b)) %>%
    group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
    summarise(
      n_a = sum(.data[[group_var]] == group_a),
      n_b = sum(.data[[group_var]] == group_b),
      median_a = median(cpm_resfinder[.data[[group_var]] == group_a], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_b = median(cpm_resfinder[.data[[group_var]] == group_b], na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(
          cpm_resfinder[.data[[group_var]] == group_a],
          cpm_resfinder[.data[[group_var]] == group_b]
        )$p.value,
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      padj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
      log2_median_ratio = log2((median_a + 1e-6) / (median_b + 1e-6)),
      direction = case_when(
        is.na(padj) ~ "not_tested",
        padj < 0.05 & log2_median_ratio > 0 ~ paste0("higher_in_", group_a),
        padj < 0.05 & log2_median_ratio < 0 ~ paste0("higher_in_", group_b),
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(padj, desc(abs(log2_median_ratio)))

  write_csv(tbl, paste0("../results/interpretation_", out_stub, ".csv"))

  plot_tbl <- tbl %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj), padj < 0.05) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20)

  p <- ggplot(plot_tbl, aes(x = reorder(Drug_Class_Resfinder, log2_median_ratio), y = log2_median_ratio, fill = direction)) +
    geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
    coord_flip() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.4) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(group_a, " vs ", group_b),
      subtitle = "Top BH-significant classes by effect size",
      x = "Drug class",
      y = "log2 median ratio"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")+
    theme_publication_with_title()

  print(head(tbl, 20))
  print(p)

  ggsave(
    paste0("../figures/interpretation_", out_stub, ".svg"),
    p,
    width = 10,
    height = 7,
    web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
  )

  tbl
}

# Pigs vs Pig farmers
interp_pigs_vs_farmers <- compare_resfinder_groups(
  cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category",
  group_a = "Pigs",
  group_b = farmer_level,
  out_stub = "pigs_vs_pig_farmers"
)

# Pigs vs controls
interp_pigs_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
  cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category",
  group_a = "Pigs",
  group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
  out_stub = "pigs_vs_controls"
)
```

#### suckling pigs have more /less drugs then older pigs

```{r}
if ("category2" %in% colnames(cpm_resfinder_long)) {
  interp_suckling_vs_older <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category2",
    group_a = "Suckling_piglets",
    group_b = "Older_pigs",
    out_stub = "suckling_vs_older"
  )
} else {
  message("Column 'category2' is missing; cannot run suckling vs older contrast.")
}
```

#### controls have sig more of

```{r}
# Collect classes that are significantly higher in controls.
controls_higher_tbl <- bind_rows(
  interp_pigs_vs_controls %>%
    mutate(contrast = "Pigs_vs_controls"),
  compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category",
    group_a = farmer_level,
    group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
    out_stub = "pig_farmers_vs_controls"
  ) %>%
    mutate(contrast = "Pig_farmers_vs_controls")
) %>%
  filter(direction == "higher_in_Non_farmer_controls") %>%
  arrange(padj)

print(controls_higher_tbl, n = Inf)
write_csv(controls_higher_tbl, "../results/interpretation_controls_higher_classes.csv")
```

#### suckling/oder pigs and farmer have sig more of than controls

Interpretation: This section identifies Drug_Class_Resfinder classes that are significantly more abundant in exposed groups (Suckling piglets, Older pigs, and Pig farmers) than in Non-farmer controls, based on Mann-Whitney tests with BH correction. Classes retained in `exposed_higher_vs_controls` represent a shared exposure-associated AMR signature, while contrast-specific hits indicate age-stage or occupation-specific enrichment patterns.

```{r}
# Exposure groups higher than controls in each contrast.
interp_farmers_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
  cpm_resfinder_long,
  group_var = "category",
  group_a = farmer_level,
  group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
  out_stub = "pig_farmers_vs_controls"
)

if (exists("interp_suckling_vs_older")) {
  interp_suckling_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category2",
    group_a = "Suckling_piglets",
    group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
    out_stub = "suckling_vs_controls"
  )

  interp_older_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category2",
    group_a = "Older_pigs",
    group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
    out_stub = "older_vs_controls"
  )

  exposed_higher_vs_controls <- bind_rows(
    interp_suckling_vs_controls %>% mutate(contrast = "Suckling_vs_controls"),
    interp_older_vs_controls %>% mutate(contrast = "Older_vs_controls"),
    interp_farmers_vs_controls %>% mutate(contrast = "Pig_farmers_vs_controls")
  ) %>%
    filter(direction %in% c("higher_in_Suckling_piglets", "higher_in_Older_pigs", paste0("higher_in_", farmer_level))) %>%
    arrange(contrast, padj)

  print(exposed_higher_vs_controls, n = Inf)
  write_csv(exposed_higher_vs_controls, "../results/interpretation_exposed_groups_higher_vs_controls.csv")
} else {
  message("Run the previous chunk first (or ensure category2 is present) to compute stage-specific contrasts.")
}
```

#### shared AMR signature scatterplot (pigs vs controls x farmers vs controls)

```{r}
# One point per drug class:
# x = log2 median ratio (Pigs vs Non_farmer_controls)
# y = log2 median ratio (Pig_farmers vs Non_farmer_controls)

if (!exists("interp_pigs_vs_controls")) {
  interp_pigs_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category",
    group_a = "Pigs",
    group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
    out_stub = "pigs_vs_controls"
  )
}

if (!exists("interp_farmers_vs_controls")) {
  interp_farmers_vs_controls <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category",
    group_a = farmer_level,
    group_b = "Non_farmer_controls",
    out_stub = "pig_farmers_vs_controls"
  )
}

drugclass_fc_scatter <- interp_pigs_vs_controls %>%
  select(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder,
    l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl = log2_median_ratio,
    padj_pigs_vs_ctrl = padj
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    interp_farmers_vs_controls %>%
      select(
        Drug_Class_Resfinder,
        l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl = log2_median_ratio,
        padj_farmers_vs_ctrl = padj
      ),
    by = "Drug_Class_Resfinder"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    quadrant = case_when(
      l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl > 0 & l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl > 0 ~ "higher_in_both_exposed",
      l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl > 0 & l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl <= 0 ~ "higher_in_pigs_only",
      l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl <= 0 & l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl > 0 ~ "higher_in_farmers_only",
      TRUE ~ "higher_in_controls"
    ),
    mw_pigs = case_when(
      is.na(padj_pigs_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
      padj_pigs_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl > 0 ~ "sig_higher_in_all_pigs",
      padj_pigs_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl < 0 ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    mw_farmers = case_when(
      is.na(padj_farmers_vs_ctrl) ~ "not_tested",
      padj_farmers_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl > 0 ~ "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers",
      padj_farmers_vs_ctrl < 0.05 & l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl < 0 ~ "sig_higher_in_controls",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    concordance = case_when(
      mw_pigs == "not_tested" | mw_farmers == "not_tested" ~ "not_tested",
      mw_pigs == "sig_higher_in_all_pigs" & mw_farmers == "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers" ~ "sig_both_exposed",
      mw_pigs == "sig_higher_in_all_pigs" & mw_farmers != "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers" ~ "sig_pigs_only",
      mw_pigs != "sig_higher_in_all_pigs" & mw_farmers == "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers" ~ "sig_farmers_only",
      mw_pigs == "sig_higher_in_controls" | mw_farmers == "sig_higher_in_controls" ~ "sig_controls",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    max_sig = pmax(-log10(padj_pigs_vs_ctrl + 1e-300), -log10(padj_farmers_vs_ctrl + 1e-300), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

label_df <- drugclass_fc_scatter %>%
  arrange(desc(max_sig)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 18)

p_drugclass_fc_scatter <- ggplot(
  drugclass_fc_scatter,
  aes(x = l2mr_pigs_vs_ctrl, y = l2mr_farmers_vs_ctrl, color = quadrant, shape = concordance)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.9, size = 2.5) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = Drug_Class_Resfinder),
    family = "DeJaVu Sans",
    size = 5,
    max.overlaps = 40,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "higher_in_both_exposed" = "#1B9E77",
      "higher_in_pigs_only" = "#D95F02",
      "higher_in_farmers_only" = "#7570B3",
      "higher_in_controls" = "#666666"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "higher_in_both_exposed" = "Higher in both exposed groups",
      "higher_in_pigs_only" = "Higher in pigs only",
      "higher_in_farmers_only" = "Higher in farmers only",
      "higher_in_controls" = "Higher in controls"
    )
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "sig_both_exposed" = 16,
      "sig_pigs_only" = 17,
      "sig_farmers_only" = 15,
      "sig_controls" = 18,
      "ns" = 1,
      "not_tested" = 4
    ),
    labels = c(
      "sig_both_exposed" = "sig in both exposed groups",
      "sig_pigs_only" = "sig_higher_in_all_pigs only",
      "sig_farmers_only" = "sig_higher_in_pig_farmers only",
      "sig_controls" = "sig_higher_in_controls",
      "ns" = "ns",
      "not_tested" = "not_tested"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Drug-class effect concordance across exposed groups",
    subtitle = "x: Pigs vs controls, y: Pig farmers vs controls (log2 median ratio)",
    x = "log2 median ratio (Pigs vs Controls)",
    y = "log2 median ratio (Farmers vs Controls)",
    color = "exposed groups",
    shape = "Mann-Whitney concordance"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

p_drugclass_fc_scatter <- p_drugclass_fc_scatter +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal"
  )+
  labs(title = NULL, subtitle = NULL)+
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top",
      nrow = 3,       # 3 color entries under "exposed groups"
      byrow = TRUE
    ),
    shape = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top",
      nrow = 4,       # 4 shape entries under "Mann-Whitney concordance"
      byrow = TRUE
    )
  )

print(p_drugclass_fc_scatter)

write_csv(
  drugclass_fc_scatter,
  "../results/interpretation_drugclass_log2ratio_scatter_pigs_farmers_vs_controls.csv"
)

ggsave(
  "../figures/interpretation_drugclass_log2ratio_scatter_pigs_farmers_vs_controls.svg",
  p_drugclass_fc_scatter,
  width = 7,
  height = 8,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

#### drugs the same in pigs and pig farmers

```{r}
# Drug classes with similar abundance between pigs and pig farmers.
# "Same" is defined as:
# 1) no significant difference (BH-adjusted p >= 0.05)
# 2) small effect size (absolute log2 median ratio <= effect_tolerance)

if (!exists("interp_pigs_vs_farmers")) {
  interp_pigs_vs_farmers <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category",
    group_a = "Pigs",
    group_b = farmer_level,
    out_stub = "pigs_vs_pig_farmers"
  )
}

effect_tolerance <- 0.5

same_pigs_farmers_tbl <- interp_pigs_vs_farmers %>%
  mutate(
    same_status = case_when(
      is.na(padj) ~ "not_tested",
      padj >= 0.05 & abs(log2_median_ratio) <= effect_tolerance ~ "same",
      TRUE ~ "different"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(same_status, desc(padj), abs(log2_median_ratio))

same_only_tbl <- same_pigs_farmers_tbl %>%
  filter(same_status == "same") %>%
  select(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder,
    n_a,
    n_b,
    median_a,
    median_b,
    log2_median_ratio,
    p_value,
    padj,
    same_status
  )

cat("Drug classes classified as same (Pigs vs Pig_farmers):", nrow(same_only_tbl), "\n")
print(same_only_tbl, n = Inf)

write_csv(
  same_only_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_same_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers.csv"
)

write_csv(
  same_pigs_farmers_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_same_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers_full.csv"
)

# Quick overview plot: classes near zero effect and non-significant are highlighted.
p_same_pigs_farmers <- ggplot(
  same_pigs_farmers_tbl,
  aes(x = log2_median_ratio, y = -log10(padj + 1e-300), color = same_status)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-effect_tolerance, effect_tolerance), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85, size = 2.2) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = Drug_Class_Resfinder),
    size = 2.7,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.2,
    point.padding = 0.15,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("same" = "#1B9E77", "different" = "#D95F02", "not_tested" = "#999999")) +
  labs(
    title = "Pigs vs Pig farmers: similar vs different drug classes",
    subtitle = paste0("same = BH p >= 0.05 and |log2 median ratio| <= ", effect_tolerance),
    x = "log2 median ratio (Pigs / Pig_farmers)",
    y = "-log10(BH p-value)",
    color = "Classification"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")+
  theme_publication()

print(p_same_pigs_farmers)

ggsave(
  "../figures/interpretation_same_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers.svg",
  p_same_pigs_farmers,
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

#### drugs different between humans (controls and pig farmers) vs. pigs

Interpretation: This final contrast highlights Drug_Class_Resfinder classes that separate the pig microbiome signal from the human-associated signal (controls + pig farmers). Classes with BH-significant p-values and non-trivial log2 median ratios indicate biologically relevant host-group differences, while non-significant classes suggest overlap between human and pig resistome composition.

```{r}

# Explicit contrast: Pigs vs Humans (Humans = Non_farmer_controls + Pig_farmers)
cpm_resfinder_human_vs_pig <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  mutate(
    host_group = case_when(
      category == "Pigs" ~ "Pigs",
      category %in% c("Non_farmer_controls", farmer_level) ~ "Humans",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(host_group))

interp_humans_vs_pigs <- compare_resfinder_groups(
  cpm_resfinder_human_vs_pig,
  group_var = "host_group",
  group_a = "Pigs",
  group_b = "Humans",
  out_stub = "pigs_vs_humans_combined"
)

# Split for concise interpretation tables
human_higher_tbl <- interp_humans_vs_pigs %>%
  filter(direction == "higher_in_Humans") %>%
  arrange(padj, desc(abs(log2_median_ratio)))

pig_higher_tbl <- interp_humans_vs_pigs %>%
  filter(direction == "higher_in_Pigs") %>%
  arrange(padj, desc(abs(log2_median_ratio)))

write_csv(
  human_higher_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_humans_higher_vs_pigs_combined.csv"
)

write_csv(
  pig_higher_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_pigs_higher_vs_humans_combined.csv"
)

cat("Human-higher classes (BH<0.05 direction call):", nrow(human_higher_tbl), "\n")
cat("Pig-higher classes (BH<0.05 direction call):", nrow(pig_higher_tbl), "\n")
print(head(interp_humans_vs_pigs, 20))

```

#### non-sig between pigs and farmers

```{r}
# Same base contrast as the pigs vs pig farmers section, but focused on non-differential classes.
if (!exists("interp_pigs_vs_farmers")) {
  interp_pigs_vs_farmers <- compare_resfinder_groups(
    cpm_resfinder_long,
    group_var = "category",
    group_a = "Pigs",
    group_b = farmer_level,
    out_stub = "pigs_vs_pig_farmers"
  )
}

effect_tolerance <- 0.5

non_diff_pigs_farmers_tbl <- interp_pigs_vs_farmers %>%
  mutate(
    non_diff_status = case_when(
      is.na(padj) ~ "not_tested",
      padj >= 0.05 ~ "non_differential",
      TRUE ~ "differential"
    ),
    near_zero_effect = abs(log2_median_ratio) <= effect_tolerance
  ) %>%
  arrange(non_diff_status, desc(padj), abs(log2_median_ratio))

non_diff_only_tbl <- non_diff_pigs_farmers_tbl %>%
  filter(non_diff_status == "non_differential") %>%
  select(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder,
    n_a,
    n_b,
    median_a,
    median_b,
    log2_median_ratio,
    p_value,
    padj,
    near_zero_effect,
    non_diff_status
  )

write_csv(
  non_diff_only_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_non_differential_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers.csv"
)

write_csv(
  non_diff_pigs_farmers_tbl,
  "../results/interpretation_non_differential_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers_full.csv"
)

cat("Non-differential classes (BH p >= 0.05):", nrow(non_diff_only_tbl), "\n")

# Barplot style (same family as other interpretation plots), focused on non-differential classes.
non_diff_plot_tbl <- non_diff_only_tbl %>%
  mutate(effect_class = if_else(near_zero_effect, "near_zero_effect", "non_zero_effect")) %>%
  arrange(abs(log2_median_ratio), desc(padj)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 30)

p_non_diff_pigs_farmers <- ggplot(
  non_diff_plot_tbl,
  aes(
    x = reorder(Drug_Class_Resfinder, log2_median_ratio),
    y = log2_median_ratio,
    fill = effect_class
  )
) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.9) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-effect_tolerance, effect_tolerance), linetype = "dotted", color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.35) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "near_zero_effect" = "#1B9E77",
      "non_zero_effect" = "#80CDC1"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "near_zero_effect" = paste0("|log2 ratio| <= ", effect_tolerance),
      "non_zero_effect" = paste0("|log2 ratio| > ", effect_tolerance)
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pigs vs Pig farmers: non-differential drug classes",
    subtitle = "Top non-differential classes (BH p >= 0.05), ranked by smallest absolute effect",
    x = "Drug class",
    y = "log2 median ratio (Pigs / Pig_farmers)",
    fill = "Effect size class"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "DejaVu Sans", base_size = FIG_BASE_SIZE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  theme_publication()

print(p_non_diff_pigs_farmers)

ggsave(
  "../figures/interpretation_non_differential_drugclasses_pigs_vs_pigfarmers.svg",
  p_non_diff_pigs_farmers,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

#### relative abundance bar plots new drug classes, cpm values

```{r}
# Build 100% stacked bar chart from the new Resfinder drug-class annotation.
# We first compute per-sample relative abundance, then average within category.
rel_resfinder_by_sample <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), category != "") %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  mutate(total_cpm_sample = sum(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    rel_abundance = if_else(total_cpm_sample > 0, cpm_resfinder / total_cpm_sample, 0)
  )

rel_resfinder_by_category_raw <- rel_resfinder_by_sample %>%
  group_by(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rel_abundance = mean(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rel_resfinder_by_category <- rel_resfinder_by_category_raw %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_rel_abundance = mean_rel_abundance / sum(mean_rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

rel_resfinder_plot <- rel_resfinder_by_category

drug_class_levels_rel <- rel_resfinder_by_category %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
  summarise(total_mean_rel_abundance = sum(mean_rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mean_rel_abundance)) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder)

drug_class_palette_rel <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(drug_class_levels_rel), palette = "Dynamic")
names(drug_class_palette_rel) <- drug_class_levels_rel

p_rel_abundance_new_drugclass <- ggplot(
  rel_resfinder_by_category %>% mutate(Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = drug_class_levels_rel)),
  aes(x = category, y = mean_rel_abundance, fill = Drug_Class_Resfinder)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.9, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative ARG abundance by new drug-class annotation",
    subtitle = "Category mean of per-sample relative abundances using manually annotated Drug_Class_Resfinder labels",
    x = "Study population",
    y = "Relative abundance",
    fill = "Drug class"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = drug_class_palette_rel, drop = FALSE) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p_rel_abundance_new_drugclass)

write_csv(rel_resfinder_by_sample, "../results/relative_abundance_new_drugclass_by_sample.csv")
write_csv(rel_resfinder_plot, "../results/relative_abundance_new_drugclass_by_category.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/relative_abundance_new_drugclass_by_category.svg",
  p_rel_abundance_new_drugclass,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
```
