```{r}
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

#### relative abundance bar plots with MLS combined

```{r}
# Combine MLS antibiotics (Macrolide, Lincosamide, Streptogramin) into single category
# and recalculate relative abundance with updated color scheme

rel_resfinder_mls_combined <- cpm_resfinder_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), category != "") %>%
  mutate(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined = case_when(
      str_to_lower(str_trim(Drug_Class_Resfinder)) %in% c(
        "macrolide", "macrolides",
        "lincosamide", "lincosamides",
        "streptogramin", "streptogramins"
      ) ~ "MLS",
      TRUE ~ Drug_Class_Resfinder
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(sample, Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined) %>%
  summarise(
    cpm_combined = sum(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category), by = "sample")

# Compute per-sample relative abundance
rel_resfinder_mls_by_sample <- rel_resfinder_mls_combined %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  mutate(total_cpm_sample = sum(cpm_combined, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    rel_abundance = if_else(total_cpm_sample > 0, cpm_combined / total_cpm_sample, 0)
  )

# Average per category
rel_resfinder_mls_by_category <- rel_resfinder_mls_by_sample %>%
  group_by(category, Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rel_abundance = mean(rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_rel_abundance = mean_rel_abundance / sum(mean_rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

mls_levels <- rel_resfinder_mls_by_category %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined) %>%
  summarise(total_mean_rel_abundance = sum(mean_rel_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mean_rel_abundance)) %>%
  pull(Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined)

mls_colors <- grDevices::hcl.colors(length(mls_levels), palette = "Dynamic")
names(mls_colors) <- mls_levels

# Keep MLS visually emphasized.
if ("MLS" %in% names(mls_colors)) {
  mls_colors["MLS"] <- "#D62728"
}

p_rel_abundance_mls_combined <- ggplot(
  rel_resfinder_mls_by_category %>%
    mutate(Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined, levels = mls_levels)),
  aes(x = category, y = mean_rel_abundance, fill = Drug_Class_Resfinder_Combined)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.85, color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = mls_colors,
    name = "Drug class",
    guide = guide_legend(ncol = 2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Relative ARG abundance by drug class (MLS combined)",
    subtitle = "MLS antibiotics (Macrolide, Lincosamide, Streptogramin) aggregated as single category",
    x = "Study population",
    y = "Relative abundance"
  ) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p_rel_abundance_mls_combined)

write_csv(rel_resfinder_mls_by_sample, "../results/relative_abundance_mls_combined_by_sample.csv")
write_csv(rel_resfinder_mls_by_category, "../results/relative_abundance_mls_combined_by_category.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/relative_abundance_mls_combined_by_category.svg",
  p_rel_abundance_mls_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)

cat("✓ MLS-combined relative abundance plot generated and saved\n")
```

#### 3x3 summary barplot of selected drug classes

```{r}
# Publication-style 3x3 panel of mean CPM abundance by category for selected classes.
target_class_map <- c(
  "sptrepgoramin" = "Streptogramin",
  "lincosamides" = "Lincosamides",
  "macrolides" = "Macrolides",
  "aiminogylcosides" = "Aminoglycosides",
  "sulfonamides" = "Sulfonamide",
  "beta-lactam" = "Beta-lactam",
  "mupirocin" = "Mupirocin",
  "glycopeptides" = "Glycopeptides",
  "tetracylcines" = "Tetracyclines"
)

target_classes <- unname(target_class_map)

sample_tbl <- meta %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  select(sample, category)

# Complete sample x class grid so missing observations are treated as true zeros.
summary_3x3_long <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  sample = sample_tbl$sample,
  Drug_Class_Resfinder = target_classes
) %>%
  left_join(cpm_resfinder_long %>% select(sample, Drug_Class_Resfinder, cpm_resfinder),
            by = c("sample", "Drug_Class_Resfinder")) %>%
  left_join(sample_tbl, by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(cpm_resfinder = replace_na(cpm_resfinder, 0))

summary_3x3_stats <- summary_3x3_long %>%
  group_by(Drug_Class_Resfinder, category) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_cpm = mean(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_cpm = sd(cpm_resfinder, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

panel_labels <- c(
  "Streptogramin" = "Streptogramin",
  "Lincosamides" = "Lincosamides",
  "Macrolides" = "Macrolides",
  "Aminoglycosides" = "Aminoglycosides",
  "Sulfonamide" = "Sulfonamides",
  "Beta-lactam" = "Beta-lactam",
  "Mupirocin" = "Mupirocin",
  "Glycopeptides" = "Glycopeptides",
  "Tetracyclines" = "Tetracyclines"
)

summary_3x3_stats <- summary_3x3_stats %>%
  mutate(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = target_classes, labels = panel_labels[target_classes]),
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs"))
  )

summary_3x3_plot <- summary_3x3_long %>%
  mutate(
    Drug_Class_Resfinder = factor(Drug_Class_Resfinder, levels = target_classes, labels = panel_labels[target_classes]),
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs"))
  )

p_drugclass_3x3 <- ggplot(summary_3x3_plot, aes(x = category, y = cpm_resfinder, fill = category)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.85, outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.18, size = 1.0, alpha = 0.35, color = "black") +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",
    comparisons = list(
      c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers"),
      c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pigs"),
      c("Pig_farmers", "Pigs")
    ),
    p.adjust.method = "BH",
    label = "p.format",
    family = "DejaVu Sans",
    hide.ns = TRUE,
    step.increase = 0.08,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)+
  facet_wrap(~ Drug_Class_Resfinder, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_codes$sample_types) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "ARG abundance distribution across selected drug classes",
    subtitle = "Per-sample CPM by category (pairwise Wilcoxon rank-sum tests, BH-adjusted)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Abundance (CPM)",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(
    #text = element_text(family =  "DejaVu Sans"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    
  )

print(p_drugclass_3x3)

write_csv(summary_3x3_stats, "../results/drugclass_3x3_summary_stats.csv")
write_csv(summary_3x3_plot, "../results/drugclass_3x3_sample_values.csv")

library(svglite)
ggsave(
  "../figures/drugclass_3x3_summary_barplot.svg",
  p_drugclass_3x3,
  width = 13,
  height = 14,
  device = svglite::svglite,
  system_fonts = list(sans = "DejaVu Sans")
)
```

## Hypothesis Check: High Richness but Low Evenness in Pigs and Pig Farmers

```{r}
# Test whether pigs/farmers show higher richness but stronger dominance and lower evenness.

# Build ARO-term x sample matrix from currently active CPM matrix (global CPM<1 filter already applied).
gene_to_aro_hyp <- feats %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  transmute(
    Prevalence_Sequence_ID,
    ARO_Term = if_else(is.na(ARO_Term) | ARO_Term == "", Prevalence_Sequence_ID, as.character(ARO_Term))
  )

cpm_aro_hyp_long <- cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Prevalence_Sequence_ID, names_to = "sample", values_to = "cpm") %>%
  left_join(gene_to_aro_hyp, by = "Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  group_by(sample, ARO_Term) %>%
  summarise(cpm_aro = sum(cpm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cpm_aro_hyp_mat <- cpm_aro_hyp_long %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample, values_from = cpm_aro, values_fill = 0) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(cpm_aro_hyp_mat) <- cpm_aro_hyp_mat$ARO_Term
cpm_aro_hyp_mat$ARO_Term <- NULL
cpm_aro_hyp_mat <- as.matrix(cpm_aro_hyp_mat)

samples_keep_hyp <- intersect(colnames(cpm_aro_hyp_mat), rownames(meta))
samples_keep_hyp <- intersect(samples_keep_hyp, names(sample_depths))
cpm_aro_hyp_mat <- cpm_aro_hyp_mat[, samples_keep_hyp, drop = FALSE]

# Per-sample composition metrics on ARO-term level
sample_metrics_hyp <- purrr::map_dfr(colnames(cpm_aro_hyp_mat), function(s) {
  x <- cpm_aro_hyp_mat[, s]
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  s_total <- sum(x)
  p <- if (s_total > 0) x / s_total else rep(0, length(x))
  p_pos <- p[p > 0]
  richness <- sum(x > 0)
  shannon <- if (length(p_pos) > 0) -sum(p_pos * log(p_pos)) else NA_real_
  simpson <- if (length(p_pos) > 0) 1 - sum(p_pos^2) else NA_real_
  pielou <- if (!is.na(shannon) && richness > 1) shannon / log(richness) else NA_real_
  dominance <- if (length(p_pos) > 0) max(p_pos) else NA_real_
  top10_share <- if (length(p_pos) > 0) sum(sort(p_pos, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(10, length(p_pos))]) else NA_real_
  rare_share <- if (s_total > 0) sum(x[x > 0 & x < 10]) / s_total else NA_real_

  tibble(
    sample = s,
    aro_richness = richness,
    shannon = shannon,
    simpson = simpson,
    pielou_J = pielou,
    dominance_max = dominance,
    top10_share = top10_share,
    rare_share_cpm_lt10 = rare_share
  )
}) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample"), by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(
    category = as.factor(category),
    depth = as.numeric(sample_depths[sample])
  )

# Depth-corrected models for key hypothesis metrics
metrics_to_test <- c("aro_richness", "shannon", "simpson", "pielou_J", "dominance_max", "top10_share", "rare_share_cpm_lt10")

hypothesis_lm_stats <- purrr::map_dfr(metrics_to_test, function(m) {
  fit <- lm(as.formula(paste(m, "~ category + depth")), data = sample_metrics_hyp)
  a <- anova(fit)
  tibble(
    metric = m,
    p_category = a["category", "Pr(>F)"],
    p_depth = a["depth", "Pr(>F)"]
  )
})

print(hypothesis_lm_stats)

# Rank-abundance (Whittaker) by category using category medians
rank_curve_tbl <- sample_metrics_hyp %>%
  select(sample, category) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  inner_join(cpm_aro_hyp_long, by = "sample") %>%
  group_by(category, ARO_Term) %>%
  summarise(median_cpm = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  mutate(rel = median_cpm / sum(median_cpm, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(rel > 0) %>%
  arrange(category, desc(rel)) %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

p_rank_abundance_hyp <- ggplot(rank_curve_tbl, aes(x = rank, y = rel, color = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_color_manual(values = sample_type_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "ARO-term rank-abundance curves by category",
    subtitle = "Steeper curves indicate stronger dominance and lower evenness",
    x = "Rank (log scale)",
    y = "Relative abundance (log scale)",
    color = "Category"
  ) +
  theme_publication()

print(p_rank_abundance_hyp)

# Compact panel for interpretation metrics
plot_metrics <- c("dominance_max", "top10_share", "rare_share_cpm_lt10")

plot_metrics_tbl <- sample_metrics_hyp %>%
  select(sample, category, all_of(plot_metrics)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(plot_metrics), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

hypothesis_kw_stats <- plot_metrics_tbl %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  rstatix::kruskal_test(value ~ category)

hypothesis_metric_limits <- plot_metrics_tbl %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_range = diff(range(value, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y_step = if_else(
      is.finite(y_range) & y_range > 0,
      y_range * 0.08,
      pmax(abs(y_max) * 0.1, 0.1)
    )
  )

hypothesis_pairwise_stats <- plot_metrics_tbl %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  pairwise_wilcox_test(value ~ category, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  left_join(hypothesis_metric_limits, by = "metric") %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  arrange(p.adj, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(y.position = y_max + row_number() * y_step) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj_label = if_else(
      is.na(p.adj),
      NA_character_,
      if_else(p.adj < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(p.adj, format = "f", digits = 3))
    )
  )

print(hypothesis_kw_stats)
print(hypothesis_pairwise_stats)

p_hyp_metrics <- ggplot(plot_metrics_tbl, aes(x = category, y = value, fill = category)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.18, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sample_type_colors) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(
    hypothesis_pairwise_stats,
    label = "p.adj_label",
    hide.ns = TRUE,
    tip.length = 0.01,
    size = 5,
    family = "DejaVu Sans"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Hypothesis diagnostics on ARO-term composition",
    subtitle = "Expected pattern: higher richness with lower evenness and higher dominance; per-panel Kruskal-Wallis and BH-adjusted pairwise Wilcoxon tests",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, size = 12))+
  scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)

print(p_hyp_metrics)

write_csv(sample_metrics_hyp, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_sample_metrics.csv")
write_csv(hypothesis_lm_stats, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_depth_corrected_lm_pvalues.csv")
write_csv(hypothesis_kw_stats, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_metrics_kruskal.csv")
write_csv(hypothesis_pairwise_stats, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_metrics_pairwise_wilcox.csv")
write_csv(rank_curve_tbl, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_rank_abundance_by_category.csv")

ggsave("../figures/hypothesis_aro_term_rank_abundance.svg", p_rank_abundance_hyp, width = 8, height = 6, web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans")
ggsave("../figures/hypothesis_aro_term_metrics_panel.svg", p_hyp_metrics, width = 12, height = 8, web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans")
```

### Rare-feature fraction by count (ARO-term level)

```{r}
# Rare-feature fraction by count:
#   #(0 < CPM < 10) / #(CPM > 0)

rare_fraction_count_df <- purrr::map_dfr(colnames(cpm_aro_hyp_mat), function(s) {
  x <- cpm_aro_hyp_mat[, s]
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n_detected <- sum(x > 0)
  n_rare <- sum(x > 0 & x < 10)

  tibble(
    sample = s,
    n_detected_terms = n_detected,
    n_rare_terms_cpm_0_10 = n_rare,
    rare_feature_fraction_count = if_else(n_detected > 0, n_rare / n_detected, NA_real_)
  )
}) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample"), by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(category = as.factor(category))

pairwise_rare_fraction_count <- rare_fraction_count_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(rare_feature_fraction_count)) %>%
  pairwise_wilcox_test(rare_feature_fraction_count ~ category, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns") %>%
  mutate(
    y.position = seq(
      from = max(rare_fraction_count_df$rare_feature_fraction_count, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05,
      to = max(rare_fraction_count_df$rare_feature_fraction_count, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.20,
      length.out = dplyr::n()
    )
  )

p_rare_fraction_count <- ggplot(
  rare_fraction_count_df,
  aes(x = category, y = rare_feature_fraction_count, fill = category)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.18, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sample_type_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Rare-feature fraction by count",
    subtitle = "#(0 < CPM < 10) / #(CPM > 0) on ARO-term level",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Rare-feature fraction"
  ) +
  theme_publication() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)

if (nrow(pairwise_rare_fraction_count) > 0) {
  p_rare_fraction_count <- p_rare_fraction_count +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      pairwise_rare_fraction_count,
      label = "p.adj",
      tip.length = 0.01,
      size = 4,
      family = "DejaVu Sans"
    )
}

print(p_rare_fraction_count)

write_csv(rare_fraction_count_df, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_rare_feature_fraction_count_values.csv")
write_csv(pairwise_rare_fraction_count, "../results/hypothesis_aro_term_rare_feature_fraction_count_pairwise_wilcox.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/hypothesis_aro_term_rare_feature_fraction_count.svg",
  p_rare_fraction_count,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```

### Gene-level rare candidates in pigs and pig farmers

```{r}
# Identify genes that are frequently rare (0 < CPM < 10) in both exposed groups.
# Controls are not used as a filter criterion in this relaxed version.

farmer_level_local <- if ("Pig_farmers" %in% unique(meta$category)) {
  "Pig_farmers"
} else if ("Pig_farmer" %in% unique(meta$category)) {
  "Pig_farmer"
} else {
  stop("No pig farmer level found in meta$category.")
}

target_groups <- c(farmer_level_local, "Pigs")

gene_cpm_hyp_long <- cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Prevalence_Sequence_ID, names_to = "sample", values_to = "cpm_gene") %>%
  left_join(
    meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>%
  mutate(category = trimws(as.character(category))) %>%
  filter(category %in% target_groups)

gene_group_stats_long <- gene_cpm_hyp_long %>%
  group_by(Prevalence_Sequence_ID, category) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    prev_nonzero = mean(cpm_gene > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    prev_rare_0_10 = mean(cpm_gene > 0 & cpm_gene < 10, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cpm = median(cpm_gene, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_cpm = mean(cpm_gene, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gene_group_stats <- gene_group_stats_long %>%
  mutate(category = as.character(category)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = category,
    values_from = c(n_samples, prev_nonzero, prev_rare_0_10, median_cpm, mean_cpm),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{category}"
  )

# Tunable threshold (set lower if you want a broader candidate list)
min_rare_prev <- 0.10

pig_rare_col <- "prev_rare_0_10_Pigs"
farmer_rare_col <- paste0("prev_rare_0_10_", farmer_level_local)

required_cols <- c(pig_rare_col, farmer_rare_col)
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(gene_group_stats))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required columns in gene_group_stats: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only <- gene_group_stats %>%
  filter(
    .data[[pig_rare_col]] >= min_rare_prev,
    .data[[farmer_rare_col]] >= min_rare_prev
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_rare_prev_exposed = (.data[[pig_rare_col]] + .data[[farmer_rare_col]]) / 2
  )

rare_gene_ranked_exposed_only <- gene_group_stats %>%
  mutate(
    mean_rare_prev_exposed = (.data[[pig_rare_col]] + .data[[farmer_rare_col]]) / 2,
    min_rare_prev_exposed = pmin(.data[[pig_rare_col]], .data[[farmer_rare_col]])
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    feats %>%
      rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
      select(Prevalence_Sequence_ID, ARO_Term = any_of("ARO_Term")),
    by = "Prevalence_Sequence_ID"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(min_rare_prev_exposed), desc(mean_rare_prev_exposed), desc(.data[[pig_rare_col]]), desc(.data[[farmer_rare_col]]))

rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only <- rare_gene_ranked_exposed_only %>%
  filter(
    .data[[pig_rare_col]] >= min_rare_prev,
    .data[[farmer_rare_col]] >= min_rare_prev
  )

cat("Rare-gene candidates (rare in pigs and pig farmers):", nrow(rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only), "\n")

print(
  rare_gene_ranked_exposed_only %>%
    select(Prevalence_Sequence_ID, ARO_Term, all_of(c(pig_rare_col, farmer_rare_col)), mean_rare_prev_exposed, min_rare_prev_exposed) %>%
    slice_head(n = 30)
)

write_csv(gene_group_stats, "../results/hypothesis_gene_level_group_prevalence_summary.csv")
write_csv(rare_gene_ranked_exposed_only, "../results/hypothesis_rare_gene_ranked_exposed_only_with_aro.csv")
write_csv(rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only, "../results/hypothesis_rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only_with_aro.csv")
```

### Visualize ARO terms from rare exposed genes

```{r}
# Build selected ARO-term set from rare genes and visualize across groups.
rare_exposed_aro_terms <- rare_gene_candidates_exposed_only %>%
  mutate(
    ARO_Term = if_else(is.na(ARO_Term) | ARO_Term == "", Prevalence_Sequence_ID, as.character(ARO_Term))
  ) %>%
  distinct(ARO_Term) %>%
  pull(ARO_Term)

cat("Unique ARO terms from rare exposed genes:", length(rare_exposed_aro_terms), "\n")

cpm_aro_rare_terms_long <- cpm_aro_hyp_long %>%
  filter(ARO_Term %in% rare_exposed_aro_terms) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category), by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(
    category = as.character(category),
    category = if_else(category == farmer_level_local, "Pig_farmers", category)
  ) %>%
  filter(category %in% c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs"))

if (nrow(cpm_aro_rare_terms_long) == 0) {
  message("No rows available for selected rare exposed ARO terms.")
} else {
  cpm_aro_rare_terms_long <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    mutate(category = factor(category, levels = c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs")))

  # 1) Multi-page boxplots for all selected ARO terms
  terms_sorted <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
    summarise(overall_median = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(overall_median)) %>%
    pull(ARO_Term)

  cpm_aro_rare_terms_long <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    mutate(ARO_Term = factor(ARO_Term, levels = terms_sorted))

  terms_per_page <- 12
  term_pages <- split(terms_sorted, ceiling(seq_along(terms_sorted) / terms_per_page))

  boxplot_pdf <- "../figures/rare_exposed_aro_terms_boxplots.pdf"
  if (capabilities("cairo")) {
    cairo_pdf(boxplot_pdf, width = 12, height = 10, family = "sans")
  } else {
    pdf(boxplot_pdf, width = 12, height = 10, family = "sans")
  }
  for (i in seq_along(term_pages)) {
    page_terms <- term_pages[[i]]
    p_page <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
      filter(ARO_Term %in% page_terms) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = category, y = cpm_aro, fill = category)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.18, alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9, color = "black") +
      facet_wrap(~ ARO_Term, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = sample_type_colors) +
      labs(
        title = paste0("Rare exposed ARO terms by category (page ", i, " / ", length(term_pages), ")"),
        x = NULL,
        y = "CPM"
      ) +
      theme_publication() +
      theme(legend.position = "none") +
      scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)
    print(p_page)
  }
  dev.off()

  page_index_tbl <- tibble(
    ARO_Term = unlist(term_pages),
    page = rep(seq_along(term_pages), times = lengths(term_pages))
  )

  write_csv(page_index_tbl, "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_boxplot_page_index.csv")

  # 2) Presence overlap across groups (Venn-style)
  presence_tbl <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term, category) %>%
    summarise(present = any(cpm_aro > 0, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      ARO_Term,
      category = c("Non_farmer_controls", "Pig_farmers", "Pigs"),
      fill = list(present = FALSE)
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = category, values_from = present)

  overlap_membership_tbl <- presence_tbl %>%
    transmute(
      ARO_Term,
      overlap_pattern = case_when(
        Non_farmer_controls & Pig_farmers & Pigs ~ "All three",
        Non_farmer_controls & Pig_farmers & !Pigs ~ "Controls + Farmers",
        Non_farmer_controls & !Pig_farmers & Pigs ~ "Controls + Pigs",
        !Non_farmer_controls & Pig_farmers & Pigs ~ "Farmers + Pigs",
        Non_farmer_controls & !Pig_farmers & !Pigs ~ "Controls only",
        !Non_farmer_controls & Pig_farmers & !Pigs ~ "Farmers only",
        !Non_farmer_controls & !Pig_farmers & Pigs ~ "Pigs only",
        TRUE ~ "Absent in all"
      )
    )

  overlap_tbl <- overlap_membership_tbl %>%
    dplyr::count(overlap_pattern, name = "n_aro_terms") %>%
    arrange(desc(n_aro_terms))

  p_overlap <- ggplot(overlap_tbl, aes(x = reorder(overlap_pattern, n_aro_terms), y = n_aro_terms)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#4C78A8", alpha = 0.9) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = "Overlap of rare exposed ARO terms across groups",
      subtitle = "Venn-style intersection counts",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Number of ARO terms"
    ) +
    theme_publication()

  ggsave("../figures/rare_exposed_aro_terms_overlap_barplot.svg", p_overlap, width = 8, height = 5, web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans")

  if (requireNamespace("ggvenn", quietly = TRUE)) {
    venn_list <- list(
      Non_farmer_controls = presence_tbl %>% filter(Non_farmer_controls) %>% pull(ARO_Term),
      Pig_farmers = presence_tbl %>% filter(Pig_farmers) %>% pull(ARO_Term),
      Pigs = presence_tbl %>% filter(Pigs) %>% pull(ARO_Term)
    )

    p_venn <- ggvenn::ggvenn(
      venn_list,
      fill_alpha = 0.4,
      stroke_size = 0.6,
      text_size = 4,
      set_name_size = 4.5
    ) +
      labs(title = "Venn diagram of rare exposed ARO terms")

    ggsave("../figures/rare_exposed_aro_terms_venn.svg", p_venn, width = 7, height = 6, web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans")
  }

  # 3) Mean CPM summary for selected ARO terms
  rare_aro_summary <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term, category) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_cpm = mean(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_cpm = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_nonzero = mean(cpm_aro > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  rare_aro_dot_tbl <- rare_aro_summary %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
    mutate(max_mean = max(mean_cpm, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(ARO_Term = forcats::fct_reorder(ARO_Term, max_mean, .desc = TRUE))

  p_rare_aro_dot <- ggplot(
    rare_aro_dot_tbl,
    aes(x = category, y = ARO_Term, size = prevalence_nonzero, color = mean_cpm)
  ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", trans = "log10") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.2, 6)) +
    labs(
      title = "Mean CPM and prevalence of rare exposed ARO terms",
      subtitle = "Color = mean CPM (log scale), size = prevalence",
      x = NULL,
      y = "ARO term",
      color = "Mean CPM",
      size = "Prevalence"
    ) +
    theme_publication() +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = color_codes$label_mapping)

  ggsave("../figures/rare_exposed_aro_terms_mean_cpm_prevalence_dotplot.svg", p_rare_aro_dot, width = 10, height = 16, web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans")

  write_csv(overlap_tbl, "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_overlap_counts.csv")
  write_csv(presence_tbl, "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_presence_by_group.csv")
  write_csv(overlap_membership_tbl, "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_overlap_membership.csv")
  write_csv(rare_aro_summary, "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_mean_cpm_summary.csv")
  
  # Build long annotation table with overall and per-category statistics for Excel export
  rare_aro_category_wide <- rare_aro_summary %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = category,
      values_from = c(mean_cpm, median_cpm, prevalence_nonzero),
      names_glue = "{.value}_{category}"
    )
  
  rare_aro_annotation_long <- cpm_aro_rare_terms_long %>%
    group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_cpm_overall = mean(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_cpm_overall = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_overall = mean(cpm_aro > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(rare_aro_category_wide, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
    left_join(overlap_membership_tbl, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_cpm_overall), ARO_Term)
  
  # Export comprehensive long annotation table to Excel
  if (requireNamespace("writexl", quietly = TRUE)) {
    writexl::write_xlsx(
      list(
        rare_aro_annotation = rare_aro_annotation_long,
        rare_aro_by_category = rare_aro_summary,
        overlap_membership = overlap_membership_tbl,
        presence_table = presence_tbl,
        overlap_counts = overlap_tbl
      ),
      "../results/rare_exposed_aro_terms_comprehensive_annotation.xlsx"
    )
    cat("✓ Wrote Excel file: rare_exposed_aro_terms_comprehensive_annotation.xlsx\n")
  } else {
    message("Package 'writexl' not installed; CSV export was written instead of XLSX.")
  }
  
  cat("Saved rare exposed ARO-term visualizations and summaries.\n")
}
```

### Comprehensive ARO-term annotation for all 1502 terms

```{r}
# Build comprehensive annotation table for ALL ARO-terms (not filtered to rare exposed)
# This mirrors the structure from ARO_Term.qmd for supplementary data

# 1) Ensure drug class annotation is loaded
if (!exists("drug_class_annot_manual") || nrow(drug_class_annot_manual) == 0) {
  cat("Loading drug class annotation...\n")
  drug_class_annot_manual <- read_excel("../drug_class_fam_mean_cpm.xlsx")
}

if (!exists("drug_class_resfinder_map") || nrow(drug_class_resfinder_map) == 0) {
  drug_class_resfinder_map <- drug_class_annot_manual %>%
    select(Drug_Class, Drug_Class_Resfinder) %>%
    distinct()
}

# 2) Build all-terms CPM matrix long format
cpm_aro_all_long <- cpm_aro_hyp_mat %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("ARO_Term") %>%
  pivot_longer(-ARO_Term, names_to = "sample", values_to = "cpm_aro") %>%
  left_join(meta %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% select(sample, category), by = "sample") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ARO_Term), ARO_Term != "")

# 3) Compute overall and category-wise statistics
aro_mean_cpm_all <- cpm_aro_all_long %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_cpm_aro = mean(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_cpm_aro = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

aro_median_cpm_all_by_category <- cpm_aro_all_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), category != "") %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term, category) %>%
  summarise(
    median_cpm_aro_category = median(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

aro_median_cpm_all_by_category_wide <- aro_median_cpm_all_by_category %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = category,
    values_from = median_cpm_aro_category,
    names_prefix = "median_cpm_"
  )

# 4) Map ARO terms to Drug_Class_Resfinder
aro_to_resfinder_all <- feats %>%
  rownames_to_column("Prevalence_Sequence_ID") %>%
  select(Prevalence_Sequence_ID, ARO_Term = any_of("ARO_Term"), Drug_Class) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ARO_Term), ARO_Term != "", !is.na(Drug_Class), Drug_Class != "") %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  separate_rows(Drug_Class, sep = ";\\s*") %>%
  mutate(Drug_Class = str_trim(Drug_Class)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class), Drug_Class != "") %>%
  left_join(drug_class_resfinder_map, by = "Drug_Class") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drug_Class_Resfinder), Drug_Class_Resfinder != "") %>%
  distinct(ARO_Term, Drug_Class_Resfinder)

# 5) Count mapping diversity
aro_class_counts_all <- aro_to_resfinder_all %>%
  dplyr::count(ARO_Term, name = "n_resfinder_classes") %>%
  mutate(
    weight_1_over_n = 1 / n_resfinder_classes,
    multi_annotation_flag = n_resfinder_classes > 1
  )

# 6) Build comprehensive annotation table (all terms)
aro_resfinder_annotation_all <- aro_to_resfinder_all %>%
  left_join(aro_mean_cpm_all, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  left_join(aro_median_cpm_all_by_category_wide, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  left_join(aro_class_counts_all, by = "ARO_Term") %>%
  mutate(weighted_mean_cpm_contribution = mean_cpm_aro * weight_1_over_n) %>%
  arrange(Drug_Class_Resfinder, desc(mean_cpm_aro), ARO_Term)

cat("✓ Built comprehensive annotation for", n_distinct(aro_resfinder_annotation_all$ARO_Term), "ARO-terms\n")
cat("  Across", n_distinct(aro_resfinder_annotation_all$Drug_Class_Resfinder), "drug class categories\n")

# 7) Export to CSV and Excel
write_csv(
  aro_resfinder_annotation_all,
  "../results/aro_term_resfinder_annotation_all.csv"
)

write_csv(
  aro_median_cpm_all_by_category,
  "../results/aro_term_median_cpm_all_by_category.csv"
)

if (requireNamespace("writexl", quietly = TRUE)) {
  writexl::write_xlsx(
    list(
      aro_term_resfinder_annotation = aro_resfinder_annotation_all,
      aro_term_median_cpm_by_category = aro_median_cpm_all_by_category,
      aro_term_class_counts = aro_class_counts_all
    ),
    "../results/aro_term_resfinder_annotation.xlsx"
  )
  cat("✓ Wrote Excel file: aro_term_resfinder_annotation_all_hypothesis.xlsx\n")
} else {
  message("Package 'writexl' not installed; CSV export was written instead of XLSX.")
}
```

### ARO-term driver analysis (contribution models + bubble plot)

```{r}
# Driver table at ARO-term level based on per-sample relative abundance contributions.
aro_term_contrib_long <- cpm_aro_hyp_long %>%
  left_join(sample_metrics_hyp %>% select(sample, category, depth), by = "sample") %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  mutate(
    total_cpm_sample = sum(cpm_aro, na.rm = TRUE),
    p = if_else(total_cpm_sample > 0, cpm_aro / total_cpm_sample, 0),
    shannon_contrib = if_else(p > 0, -p * log(p), 0),
    simpson_contrib = p^2,
    is_rare_1_10 = cpm_aro >= 1 & cpm_aro < 10,
    p_rank = min_rank(desc(p)),
    is_top10 = p_rank <= 10 & p > 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(sample, category, depth, ARO_Term, cpm_aro, p, shannon_contrib, simpson_contrib, is_rare_1_10, is_top10)

fit_term_contrib <- function(df_term, response_col) {
  if (n_distinct(df_term$category) < 2) {
    return(tibble(
      p_category = NA_real_,
      p_depth = NA_real_,
      mean_contrib = mean(df_term[[response_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_nonzero = mean(df_term[[response_col]] > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      effect_pigs_vs_controls = NA_real_,
      effect_farmers_vs_controls = NA_real_,
      effect_pigs_vs_farmers = NA_real_,
      max_abs_effect = NA_real_,
      dominant_group = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  fit <- tryCatch(
    lm(as.formula(paste(response_col, "~ category + depth")), data = df_term),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      p_category = NA_real_,
      p_depth = NA_real_,
      mean_contrib = mean(df_term[[response_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence_nonzero = mean(df_term[[response_col]] > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      effect_pigs_vs_controls = NA_real_,
      effect_farmers_vs_controls = NA_real_,
      effect_pigs_vs_farmers = NA_real_,
      max_abs_effect = NA_real_,
      dominant_group = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  a <- anova(fit)

  med_tbl <- df_term %>%
    group_by(category) %>%
    summarise(med = median(.data[[response_col]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  med_controls <- med_tbl$med[med_tbl$category == "Non_farmer_controls"]
  med_farmers <- med_tbl$med[med_tbl$category == "Pig_farmers"]
  med_pigs <- med_tbl$med[med_tbl$category == "Pigs"]

  med_controls <- ifelse(length(med_controls) == 0, NA_real_, med_controls)
  med_farmers <- ifelse(length(med_farmers) == 0, NA_real_, med_farmers)
  med_pigs <- ifelse(length(med_pigs) == 0, NA_real_, med_pigs)

  effect_pc <- med_pigs - med_controls
  effect_fc <- med_farmers - med_controls
  effect_pf <- med_pigs - med_farmers

  dominant_group <- med_tbl %>%
    filter(is.finite(med)) %>%
    arrange(desc(med)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    pull(category)

  if (length(dominant_group) == 0) dominant_group <- NA_character_

  tibble(
    p_category = a["category", "Pr(>F)"],
    p_depth = a["depth", "Pr(>F)"],
    mean_contrib = mean(df_term[[response_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence_nonzero = mean(df_term[[response_col]] > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    effect_pigs_vs_controls = effect_pc,
    effect_farmers_vs_controls = effect_fc,
    effect_pigs_vs_farmers = effect_pf,
    max_abs_effect = max(abs(c(effect_pc, effect_fc, effect_pf)), na.rm = TRUE),
    dominant_group = as.character(dominant_group)
  )
}

driver_shannon <- aro_term_contrib_long %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
  group_modify(~ fit_term_contrib(.x, "shannon_contrib")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_category, method = "BH"),
    response = "shannon_contrib"
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj, desc(max_abs_effect))

driver_simpson <- aro_term_contrib_long %>%
  group_by(ARO_Term) %>%
  group_modify(~ fit_term_contrib(.x, "simpson_contrib")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p_category, method = "BH"),
    response = "simpson_contrib"
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_adj, desc(max_abs_effect))

top_driver_shannon <- driver_shannon %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_adj)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 50)

top_driver_simpson <- driver_simpson %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_adj)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 50)

# Bubble plot requested: x = effect size, y = -log10(BH p), size = mean contribution.
bubble_df <- driver_shannon %>%
  filter(is.finite(max_abs_effect), is.finite(p_adj), is.finite(mean_contrib)) %>%
  mutate(score = -log10(p_adj + 1e-300)) %>%
  arrange(desc(score), desc(max_abs_effect)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 120)

label_df <- bubble_df %>%
  mutate(label_rank = score * max_abs_effect) %>%
  arrange(desc(label_rank)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

p_driver_bubble <- ggplot(
  bubble_df,
  aes(x = max_abs_effect, y = score, size = mean_contrib, color = dominant_group)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = ARO_Term),
    size = 2.8,
    max.overlaps = 40,
    box.padding = 0.25,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    segment.alpha = 0.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Mean contribution") +
  labs(
    title = "ARO-term drivers of Shannon contribution differences",
    subtitle = "x = max absolute median effect across group contrasts, y = -log10(BH-adjusted p)",
    x = "Effect size (max absolute median difference)",
    y = "-log10(BH-adjusted p-value)",
    color = "Highest median group"
  )

print(p_driver_bubble)

write_csv(aro_term_contrib_long, "../results/aro_term_contribution_long_table.csv")
write_csv(driver_shannon, "../results/aro_term_driver_shannon.csv")
write_csv(driver_simpson, "../results/aro_term_driver_simpson.csv")
write_csv(top_driver_shannon, "../results/aro_term_driver_shannon_top50.csv")
write_csv(top_driver_simpson, "../results/aro_term_driver_simpson_top50.csv")

ggsave(
  "../figures/aro_term_driver_bubble_shannon.svg",
  p_driver_bubble,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  web_fonts = "DejaVu Sans"
)
```
